description:
**Company Description  
  
**We are Accor. We are a worldwide Augmented Hospitality leader. We are more than 230,000 hospitality experts placing people at the heart of what we do, creating new connections & emotions for our guests, nurturing real passion for service and achievement beyond limits.  
  
We’re so much **more than hotels** — **we’re creating innovative lifestyle experiences** , whether you live, work or play. Blaze your own trail from **40+ hotel brands, restaurants, nightclubs, spas, co-working spaces, and tech start-ups** .  
  
At Fairmont Hotels & Resorts, we offer our guests the finest hospitality experience in each of our destinations. As part of Accor, you will join a global community that values excellence, sustainability, and innovation—where your leadership will shape exceptional guest experiences every day.  
  
**Job Description  
  
**As Director of Sales & Marketing, you will lead the commercial strategy for the pre-opening and launch of Fairmont Agra—positioning the hotel as a premier luxury destination in the market while driving revenue, brand visibility, and long-term profitability.  
  

*   Develop and execute the overall Sales, Marketing, and Distribution strategy aligned with Accor and Fairmont brand standards.
*   Lead the hotel’s pre-opening commercial roadmap including market positioning, pricing strategy, and go-to-market plans.
*   Drive revenue generation across all segments including Rooms, Events, MICE, and F&B.
*   Establish strong relationships with key clients, luxury travel partners, corporate accounts, and global distribution channels.
*   Identify new business opportunities and build strategic partnerships to maximize market share.
*   Oversee digital marketing, PR, branding, and communication strategies to ensure strong market presence pre- and post-opening.
*   Monitor competitor activity and market trends to ensure proactive and agile strategy execution.
*   Collaborate with Accor regional and global sales teams to leverage network opportunities.  
      
    

**Pre-opening Responsibilities  
  
**

*   Build and lead the Sales & Marketing team from the ground up.
*   Develop pre-opening sales plans, budgets, and revenue forecasts.
*   Establish all sales systems, reporting tools, and distribution channels (OTA, GDS, direct channels).
*   Launch brand awareness campaigns, PR initiatives, and pre-opening promotions.
*   Drive early business through key accounts, MICE planners, and luxury consortia.
*   Ensure readiness of all sales collaterals, digital assets, and brand communication.  
      
    

**Leadership & Team Management  
  
**

*   Inspire, coach, and develop a high-performing sales and marketing team.
*   Set clear objectives, monitor performance, and drive accountability.
*   Foster a culture of collaboration, innovation, and results-driven performance.
*   Work closely with Revenue Management, Operations, and Finance teams to achieve business goals.  
      
    

**Business Planning & Performance  
  
**

*   Lead the Annual Business Plan, budgeting, and forecasting processes.
*   Track performance against KPIs including revenue, market share, and profitability.
*   Optimize sales mix and distribution channels to maximize yield.
*   Ensure effective use of Accor sales tools, CRM systems, and analytics platforms.  
      
    

**Qualifications  
  
**

*   Bachelor’s degree in Business, Hospitality, or related field (Master’s preferred).
*   10–15 years of experience in hotel sales & marketing, with at least 3–5 years in a leadership role.
*   Prior pre-opening experience in a luxury or upscale hotel is highly preferred.
*   Strong understanding of luxury market segments, distribution channels, and revenue strategies.
*   Proven ability to drive results, build relationships, and lead high-performing teams.
*   Excellent communication, negotiation, and strategic thinking skills  
      
    

Additional Information  
  

*   Be part of the pre-opening journey of Fairmont Agra, a landmark luxury destination
*   Opportunity to build systems, teams, and culture from the ground up
*   Work with a globally renowned luxury hospitality brand

**Title: Director, Integrated Campaigns & Product Marketing (U.S. Market- India Based)**

  

**Job Description**

  

Fareportal is a travel technology company powering a next-generation travel concierge service. Utilizing its innovative technology and company owned and operated global contact centres, Fareportal has built strong industry partnerships providing customers access to over 500 airlines, a million lodgings, and hundreds of car rental companies around the globe. With a portfolio of consumer travel brands including CheapOair and OneTravel, Fareportal enables consumers to book-online, on mobile apps for iOS and Android, by phone, or live chat. Fareportal provides its airline partners with access to a broad customer base that books high-yielding international travel and add-on ancillaries.

  

**Role Overview:**

  

We’re looking for a **Senior Director/Director** leader to own and scale Fareportal’s integrated **campaign engine in the U.S. market**, with a strong emphasis on campaign strategy, creative excellence, and brand-led demand, complemented by **performance marketing rigor and accountability.**

  

This role will be the most **senior Marketing leader based in India**, responsible for building and managing U.S.-aligned marketing teams out of India. The role will operate within a dual reporting structure, with accountability to both the Head of Branding and the Head of Growth Marketing based in the U.S.

  

The key responsibility of this role is to connects Brand, Creative, Campaigns, Product Marketing, and Performance into a single operating system that drives awareness, consideration, conversion, App adoption, and repeat usage. You are not just launching campaigns. You are accountable for building a scalable, insight-led campaign engine that shapes the brand and delivers measurable business impact.

  

*   70% Integrated Campaign Leadership & Brand Activation
*   30% Performance Marketing Oversight & Optimization

  

**Key Responsibilities:**

*   Building high-impact, integrated brand and product campaigns that drive demand
*   Ensuring creative and messaging are clear, differentiated, and consistent across channels.
*   Turning product value into compelling campaign narratives that convert across web and app.
*   Driving App growth through strong campaign and product marketing strategy.
*   Ensuring performance marketing channels amplify and scale campaign impact

  

**What You Own**

  

**1\. Integrated Campaign & Brand Leadership (Primary – 70%)**

  

**Campaign Strategy & Execution**

*   Own the end-to-end integrated campaign system, from insight → strategy → creative → execution → optimization
*   Define and lead brand and product-led campaign platforms that work across upper and mid-funnel
*   Ensure campaigns are fully connected across:
*   Web, App, CRM, Paid Media, Social, Affiliates, Partnerships
*   Build strong campaign narratives with:
*   Clear value propositions
*   Consistent, differentiated messaging
*   Adaptation by audience, intent, and channel

  

**Brand Growth & Impact**

*   Ensure campaigns: Build brand awareness, trust, and differentiation; Reinforce product value and credibility & Drive meaningful engagement and conversion
*   Own Brand KPIs, including Awareness, consideration, preference, Brand perception (trust, value, ease, support), Share of search and demand signals

  

**Creative Operations & Campaign Excellence**

*   Lead creative direction across all major campaigns by owning relationships with creative and media agencies, ensuring:
*   High-quality output aligned to strategy
*   Speed, efficiency, and scalability
*   Set clear standards for Messaging clarity, Visual consistency and Brand expression across channels
*   Build a strong creative operating model and elevate the brand through:
*   Better storytelling
*   Stronger differentiation
*   Greater consistency across touchpoints

  

**Product Marketing Embedded in Campaigns**

*   Own product marketing strategy as it shows up in campaigns
*   Lead go-to-market and adoption strategies for:
*   ClubMiles Rewards
*   Core features (price alerts, bundles, flexibility, support)
*   Translate product capabilities into:
*   Clear, compelling customer value propositions
*   Campaign messaging that drives understanding and action
*   Partner closely with Product and UX to ensure:
*   Alignment between product experience and campaign promise
*   Feature adoption and usage, not just awareness

  

  

**2\. Performance Marketing Oversight & Optimization (Secondary – 30%)**

  

Provide strategic leadership and accountability for performance marketing as an extension of campaigns

*   Ensure performance channels effectively
*   Amplify campaign narratives
*   Scale winning creative and messages
*   Drive incremental demand and conversions

Partner with Performance Marketing leaders to:

*   Align paid media strategy with campaign objectives
*   Ensure creative and messaging consistency across performance channels

Track and optimize performance KPIs, including:

*   Conversion
*   CAC / ROAS (in partnership with performance teams)
*   App installs and activations driven by campaigns

Use performance insights to inform:

*   Creative iteration
*   Messaging refinement
*   Future campaign strategy

  

**App Growth as a Campaign Outcome**

Drive App growth through integrated campaigns and product marketing

*   App downloads
*   Activation
*   Engagement and repeat usage

Ensure campaigns encourage app-first behaviours where relevance and clearly communicate app-specific benefits

Partner with CRM and Product teams to improve Retention, Re-engagement & Lifecycle communication

  

**Campaign Effectiveness, Insights & Optimization**

Own how campaigns perform over time, not just short-term metrics, Measure and evaluate &

Build a continuous insights loop:

  

**Partner with Analytics and Research to:**

*   Connect brand and campaign performance to business outcomes
*   Translate insights into clear recommendations for future campaigns

  

**Cross-Functional Leadership**

*   Act as the central connector across:
*   Brand, Product, CRM, Performance, Analytics, and Leadership in India
*   Drive alignment, prioritization, and integration across teams
*   Elevate standards for campaign strategy, execution, and creative quality

  

  

**Impact of This Role**

  

*   Build a best-in-class, scalable integrated campaign engine
*   Elevate brand perception and differentiation in the U.S. market
*   Build a scalable, insight‑driven campaign engine that connects brand, product, and performance marketing.
*   Turn product features into compelling customer value stories
*   Drive App adoption and engagement through stronger campaigns
*   Improve conversion, retention, and customer lifetime value

  

**Qualifications & Skills**

  

**Minimum Qualifications**

  

*   Bachelor’s degree in marketing, Business, Analytics, Communications, or a related field. MBA in relevant function preferred.
*   8-10 years of experience managing digital marketing or integrated brand campaigns, preferably for global or U.S. markets.
*   Hands‑on experience with platforms such as Google Ads, Meta, Programmatic DSPs, Affiliate Networks, CRM tools, and marketing automation platforms.

  

**Core Competencies & Attributes**

  

*   Strong analytical skills: Able to interpret data, identify insights, and convert findings into actionable strategies.
*   Outstanding collaboration: Proven experience working with cross‑functional teams across geographies.
*   Leadership & influence: Comfortable leading discussions, driving decisions, and influencing stakeholders without direct authority.
*   Exceptional communication: Clear, concise, structured communicator across written, visual, and verbal formats.
*   Project management excellence: Ability to manage multiple campaigns, timelines, and stakeholders simultaneously.
*   Results-driven: Passion for performance outcomes, continuous improvement, and data‑driven marketing.

  

**Preferred Experience**

  

*   Experience working with online travel agencies (OTAs) or e‑commerce companies.
*   Familiarity with U.S. customer behaviours, travel seasonality, and market dynamics.
*   Background in A/B testing, audience strategy, brand sentiment analysis, and performance marketing.

  

**Why Join Fareportal?**

  

Opportunity to work with global teams and contribute to campaigns reaching millions of U.S. travellers.

High-growth environment with a focus on innovation, technology, and customer impact.

Collaborative culture that values creativity, problem‑solving, and continuous learning.

  

**Disclaimer**

This job description is not designed to cover or contain a comprehensive listing of activities, duties or responsibilities that are required of the employee. Fareportal reserves the right to change the job duties, responsibilities, expectations or requirements posted here at any time at the Company’s sole discretion, with or without notice.

description:

title: Marketing Director
description:
**About iQuanti**

iQuanti is an independent performance marketing firm that generates value for clients by utilising data to drive better business outcomes through digital channels. Beyond campaign strategy, management, and optimisation, we engage with clients to understand their business and produce proprietary insights that lead to stronger business results.

Through a data science-led approach to client problem-solving, we've created a differentiated suite of product-driven service offerings that we deploy to clients, including a search-predictive efficacy platform called ALPS. We're 500+ people strong worldwide, with hubs in Jersey City, Bangalore, Dallas, Chicago, Mexico City, and London.

  

**About the Team**

iQuanti’s Solutions team is comprised of marketing professionals from a variety of backgrounds who build bespoke solutions and drive growth in our current client portfolio, largely consolidated within the Fortune Global 100. Banking, Financial Services and Insurance (BFSI) vertical is one of the key areas of growth for iQuanti, and the team is focused on developing differentiated solutions for this vertical.

  

**About the Role**

iQuanti is looking for an experienced and result-driven individual to join the Solutions team as a Director of Digital Paid Channel Solutions. You will be responsible for setting up, implementing, and managing the overall digital marketing strategy for iQuanti's enterprise clients in order to maximise the digital acquisition ROI of our clients and drive growth.

This role will require strong analytical skills in both paid platforms and analytics tools with a deep knowledge of digital media, technology and best practices.

  

  

**Responsibilities**:

*   Design and implement comprehensive digital marketing strategies on all digital marketing, including SEM, Social Media, Email, Video & Display advertising campaigns
*   Collect and analyse data from various digital marketing channels to measure the effectiveness of campaigns, identify trends, and make data-driven decisions for optimisation
*   Build media plans, devise paid search campaign strategy and plans for our enterprise customers
*   Support the engagement teams who create, implement, track, analyse, and optimise campaigns across the various platforms with best-practice recommendations
*   Perform regular quality assurance/quality control checks on assigned client campaigns to ensure they are running as contracted
*   Supervise in-depth analysis of campaign performance, offering insights and recommendations for improvement
*   Continually identify automation opportunities across campaigns while driving towards client KPIs
*   Provide inputs into monthly strategy read-outs and performance insights (internally) and detailed monthly and quarterly results (to clients)

  

  

**Additionally, as a SME:**

*   Be the face of iQuanti's paid channel strategy for customers, conduct workshops, present data-led strategic plans to customers and lay down roadmaps for achieving business goals
*   Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align digital marketing strategies with overall business goals
*   Help drive new thinking and innovation in paid digital offering through expertise, advice and strategic inputs.
*   Support the consulting team to suitably position Paid Digital Solutions to prospective clients and support the development of presentations.
*   Supervise and guide the engagement teams with best-practice recommendations across the marketing platforms.
*   Incorporate relevant new developments and best practices in search advertising to client campaigns – new features, beta products, analysis methodology, etc. and participate in thought leadership initiatives.
*   Recommend changes to existing processes and systems to improve overall workload efficiency and/or performance.

  

**The Ideal Candidate Will...**

*   Have a minimum of 10 years of relevant work experience in managing paid search, PLA and display campaigns.
*   Have planned, executed and optimised full-funnel, performance marketing campaigns.
*   Be highly proficient in campaign setup on Google Ads, including audience planning, writing campaign briefs and budget prioritisation. Experience with SA360 is preferred.
*   Strong understanding of digital marketing metrics and a high degree of comfort with data analysis
*   Have performed quantitative analysis with large datasets to infer patterns in data.
*   Be an excellent communicator, capable of managing multiple priorities with teams across time zones and geographies.
*   Good mix of brand and agency side experience would be ideal.
*   Be proficient with MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
*   Bachelor’s degree in marketing/advertising, communications, MIS or statistics preferred,

Interested candidates should submit a resume and a cover letter explaining their experience in digital marketing and specific achievements in social media advertising. Please include any relevant certifications or accolades.

title: Director of Product Marketing
description:
**About the Company:**

Elucidata is an AI Solutions Tech Data-centric AI company on a mission to make life sciences AI-ready. Headquartered in San Francisco with a 120+ member team across the US and India, we’re building the future of data-centric AI for drug discovery. Our flagship AI-Agentic powered platform, Polly, helps research teams wrangle, harmonize, and analyze massive volumes of biomedical data, accelerating discoveries and making precision medicine a reality.

Recognized by Fast Company as the “Most Innovative Biotech Company of 2024,” Elucidata partners with 25+ leading organizations, including Pfizer, Novo Nordisk, Google DeepMind, Alnylam Therapeutics, and the Bill & Melinda Gates Research Institute. Backed by top VCs like Eight Roads, F-Prime, IvyCap, and Hyperplane.

  

**About the Role**

We’re looking for a Director of Solutions Marketing to shape how the world sees and understands Elucidata. This isn’t traditional product marketing , it’s strategic storytelling at the intersection of AI, biology, and data. You’ll work across teams - from product and science to sales and leadership - to define, build, and deliver compelling narratives and go-to-market strategies for our solutions. You’ll take complex ideas and turn them into _clear, credible, and compelling stories_ that drive growth and set us apart in the market.

This is a hands-on, high-impact role where you won't just launch products — you'll launch understanding.

**What You’ll Own**

*   Define the value proposition for Elucidata’s data platform and offerings — grounded in science, but told through the lens of real customer impact
*   Own solution-level messaging across key customer personas: bioinformaticians, translational scientists, pharma R&D leaders, and data teams
*   Build and drive launch strategies for new solutions, data products, or scientific capabilities
*   Partner with product, BD, and science to ensure GTM plans are tight, timely, and tied to market needs
*   Equip the field with what they need to close: decks, solution briefs, FAQs, battle cards, and more
*   Train internal teams on how to speak to our solutions with clarity and confidence
*   Develop high-quality marketing content — case studies, thought leadership, blogs, white papers, webinars
*   Collaborate with scientists, customers, and product teams to bring real-world value to life
*   Lead competitive research, segmentation, and market analysis to refine messaging and inform roadmap decisions

**What Makes You a Great Fit**

*   8–12 years in solutions/product/scientific marketing, ideally in biotech, healthtech, or data-driven life sciences
*   Deep understanding of biomedical R&D workflows, data infrastructure, or bioinformatics
*   Strong scientific grounding (MS/PhD in life sciences, bioinformatics, or related field preferred)
*   Exceptional storytelling, content creation, and cross-functional collaboration skills
*   Experience in startups or high-growth teams where speed, ambiguity, and creativity go hand in hand.

We are proud to be an equal-opportunity workplace and are an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunities regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, caste, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, or Veteran status.

**Why Join Elucidata?**

*   Opportunity to shape the future of biomedical data ecosystems by building partnerships at the frontier of science and healthcare.
*   Direct visibility with the CEO and leadership team.
*   High-impact role - the partnerships you establish will directly translate into Elucidata’s growth and customer success.
*   Work with global leaders and contribute to data-driven drug discovery.

**Benefits of working with us:**

*   Competitive compensation including ESOPs
*   Unlimited vacation and holiday time off
*   Hybrid work environment
*   Health insurance covering family
*   The opportunity to be part of a dynamic team in a growing company

  

**Elucidata at First Glance**

*   Recognised as the Most Innovative Company in Biotech (Fast Company, 2024) - for leading the charge in making life sciences data AI-ready.
*   A Decade of Curiosity, Courage, and Collaboration - hear what our team says about building the future of TechBio together.
*   Named a YourStory Tech30 Winner - celebrating innovation at the intersection of AI and biology.
*   Raised $16M in Series A Funding - led by Eight Roads, F-Prime, and our existing investors IvyCap and Hyperplane.
*   Meet Our Founders - Dr. Abhishek Jha, Swetabh Pathak, and Dr. Richard Kibbey who are redefining what’s possible in data-driven drug discovery.
*   Secured 1st Place in the NCI-CRDC AI Data Readiness Challenge - driving AI adoption in oncology research.
*   Ranked Among the Top 10 Teams in the Broad Institute’s Autoimmune Disease ML Challenge - recognised for cutting-edge innovation in biomedical AI.
*   Placed in the Top 25 Globally in the Arc Institute’s Virtual Cell Challenge (VCC) - sponsored by NVIDIA, 10x Genomics, and Ultima Genomics.
*   Read our latest publications to see how we’re advancing data-centric AI for life sciences.

title: Senior Manager, Product Marketing
description:
**About Plum**

Plum is an employee insurance and health benefits platform focused on making health insurance simple, accessible and inclusive for modern organizations. Healthcare in India is seeing a phenomenal shift with inflation in healthcare costs 3x that of general inflation. A majority of Indians are unable to afford health insurance on their own; and so as many as 600mn Indians will likely have to depend on employer-sponsored insurance.

Plum is on a mission to provide the highest quality insurance and healthcare to 10 million lives by FY2030, through companies that care. As we continue our exciting journey of transformation, we're expanding our product lines across Insurance, Healthcare and B2B2C. Plum is backed by Tiger Global and Peak XV Partners.

**About the Role**

We're looking for a high-agency Senior Product Marketing Manager with at least five years of work experience delivering high levels of product awareness, adoption, and delight. You'll be responsible for leading strategic product marketing initiatives and collaborating with teams across the board to present Plum's HR and employee apps, insurance, and health and well-being products in ways that will boost sales, drive HR/admin adoption and build employee engagement.

This is a senior strategic role where you'll act as the key bridge between our product teams and end users, driving growth strategies and ensuring successful product adoption across our various offerings. You'll need to be both a creative and quantitative thinker with proven expertise in go-to-market strategies and customer engagement.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Strategic Leadership & Positioning**

*   Own and lead the end-to-end product marketing strategy and execution for our HR and employee-focused product lines
    
*   Perform comprehensive industry and competitive research to help position Plum to win more customers and maintain market leadership
    
*   Develop and execute sophisticated go-to-market strategies for new product launches and feature releases
    
*   Use market trends and insights to influence product strategy and inform teams across the organization
    

**Growth & User Engagement**

*   Drive user acquisition, activation, engagement, and retention through strategic campaigns across mobile-first channels

title: Marketing Manager 🇮🇳
description:
At Rearc, we're committed to empowering engineers to build awesome products and experiences. Success as a business hinges on our people's ability to think freely, challenge the status quo, and speak up about alternative problem-solving approaches. If you're an engineer driven by the desire to solve problems and make a difference, you're in the right place!  
  
Our approach is simple — empower engineers with the best tools possible to make an impact within their industry.  
  
We're on the lookout for engineers who thrive on ownership and freedom, possessing not just technical prowess, but also exceptional leadership skills. Our ideal candidates are hands-on-keyboard leaders who don't just talk the talk but also walk the walk, designing and building solutions that push the boundaries of cloud computing.  
  
Founded in 2016, we pride ourselves on fostering an environment where creativity flourishes, bureaucracy is non-existent, and individuals are encouraged to challenge the status quo. We're not just a company; we're a community of problem-solvers dedicated to improving the lives of fellow software engineers.  
  
Our commitment is simple - finding the right fit for our team and cultivating a desire to make things better. If you're a cloud professional intrigued by our problem space and eager to make a difference, you've come to the right place. Join us, and let's solve problems together!  
  
We’re looking for a Marketing Manager to help shape how we bring our AI, data, and cybersecurity capabilities to market. This role sits at the intersection of product, engineering, and go-to-market, and is ideal for someone who understands how to translate complex technical solutions into clear, compelling messaging for enterprise customers. You’ll take ownership of our brand, website, and content strategy, helping us better communicate the value of what we build and drive a stronger go-to-market motion across our offerings.  
  
**What You Bring  
  
**

*   Experience in marketing or B2B marketing within data, AI, analytics, cloud, or cybersecurity
*   Background working with consulting or professional services businesses (preferred)
*   Strong understanding of enterprise technology and technical concepts
*   Experience working with or marketing to the US market
*   Ability to create clear messaging and positioning for complex technical solutions
*   Hands-on experience with:  
      
    

○ Website content and structure  
  
○ Blogs, thought leadership, and case studies  
  
○ Branding and messaging frameworks  
  

*   Strong written and verbal communication skills
*   A methodical, structured approach to marketing and storytelling
*   Comfortable working in a fast-moving, startup-style environment  
      
    

**What You'll Do  
  
**

*   Define and refine messaging and positioning for our AI, data, and cybersecurity offerings
*   Own and evolve our website content, ensuring it reflects our latest capabilities
*   Create and manage thought leadership content (blogs, articles, case studies, etc.)
*   Establish and maintain branding guidelines across all channels
*   Support and drive go-to-market (GTM) initiatives for new services and capabilities
*   Work closely with engineering and leadership to translate technical solutions into business value
*   Help build a consistent and credible market presence across digital channels
*   Identify opportunities to improve how we communicate, package, and sell our services  
      
    

Your first few weeks at Rearc will be spent in an immersive learning environment where our team will help you get up to speed. Within the first few months, you’ll have the opportunity to experiment with a lot of different tools as you find your place on the team.  
  
__Rearc is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace. Rearc is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, or other legally protected status.__

title: Marketing Manager, Social Analytics, Listening, Insights and Measurement
description:
**Minimum qualifications:  
  
**

*   Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
*   6 years of experience in marketing working across one or more marketing fields (i.e. growth, product marketing, brand marketing, social).
*   Experience managing cross-functional or cross-team projects.  
      
    

**Preferred qualifications:  
  
**

*   MBA degree.
*   7 years of experience in leading social marketing analytics and running real-time listening rooms in industries such as tech, Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG), retail, telco.
*   Experience with the latest social analytics methodologies especially AI enabled workflows.
*   Ability to think through complex problems.
*   Ability to do structured problem-solving with acute insights.
*   Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to interface with C-suite and to communicate cross-functionally.  
      
    

**About The Job  
  
**Whether you're on a consumer product (like Gmail, Search, Maps, Chrome, Android) or a business product (Google Ads, AdSense, Google Marketing Platform, Analytics), you take part in a complete marketing experience as you lead every facet of the product's journey. From determining positioning, naming, competitive analysis, feature prioritization and external communications, you help shape the product and help it grow a consumer base. This means you work with a cross-functional team across Sales, corporate communications, legal, webmasters, product development, engineering and more. In this role, you'll be involved with product marketing strategy from beginning to end.  
  
The Google India Social Marketing team is motivated to find the best ways for our brands to resonate in culture and engage with our audiences beyond traditional media. Our goal is to create unbreakable consumer relationships while empowering our audiences to speak about us in ways that are authentic, resonant, and ultimately, impactful to our business.  
  
In this role, you will lead the goal and strategy for measurement and insights for all of Google’s product areas across our social owned and operated channels. You will be the single point team expert on all social platforms, with subject matter expertise in building AI powered social listening workflows, driving social-first insights from content performance and understanding how each of the social platforms deliver outcome metrics. You will directly work with the social editorial and creative content team, feeding back relevant trends, taking content live and closing the measurement loop to deliver results.  
  
**Responsibilities  
  
**

*   Build our social listening capabilities, to make it more real-time, AI enabled across the entire social content lifecycle.
*   Consult and provide strategic expertise for all our product area marketing teams (e.g. Search, Pixel, Gemini etc), framing and translating business questions into appropriate social investigative studies and reports.
*   Work separately and with agencies to run deep social-first insights on our content performance, by leveraging the best of our AI capabilities in listening, monitoring and measurement.
*   Work fluidly with social creative teams and agencies on social first transformation for Google India by modernizing the approach to social across organic, paid social, and influencer strategy.
*   Manage social agency relationships, vendors and also build a playbook for measurement and insights to inspire partner agencies and use as a lighthouse for our regional teams.

As a Marketing Manager working on selection marketing, you will be responsible for the execution and optimization of global campaigns to help customers discover and purchase products in new categories. title: Manager, B2B Marketing (Bangkok-based, relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda  
  
**At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.  
  
Today, we are part of Booking Holdings \[NASDAQ: BKNG\], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.  
  
No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.  
  
**The Opportunity  
  
**The B2B event marketing team is looking for a strategic and results-driven Marketing Manager to own and scale this channel - events are strategic levers for growth, activation, and relationship building.  
  
This is not a logistics-led role. While operational execution is a critical component, this position sits at the intersection of strategy and execution, shaping how events drive measurable business impact at scale, it lies in **strategic planning, stakeholder orchestration, and building scalable frameworks that elevate events into a measurable business growth engine.  
  
**We are looking for someone who thrives in ambiguity, builds clarity through frameworks, and can lead complex cross-functional initiatives with discipline and influence, can earn strong stakeholder trust and executive confidence.  
  
Traditional event production experience is not a prerequisite. A background in consulting, strategy, PMO, is highly valued and encouraged to apply.  
  
As a key player in the marketing and sales ecosystem, you will work closely with regional sales teams and business development teams to ensure that events align with business priorities, enable and support business objectives, and contribute directly to revenue goals. You’ll be responsible for end-to-end event management.  
  
**Key Responsibilities  
  
**

*   Event Strategy & Business Integration
*   Translate commercial priorities into event strategies with clear business cases
*   Develop annual roadmaps aligned to growth objectives
*   Define success metrics beyond attendance (pipeline impact, activation, ROI, incrementality)
*   Create scalable playbooks and operating models
*   Cross-Functional Leadership
*   Partner with Business development, Sales, Supply, PR, Content, Branding and Senior Leadership
*   Align diverse stakeholders with competing priorities
*   Drive structured working sessions and executive updates
*   Influence without direct authority in a matrix organization
*   Program & Project Governance
*   Lead large, multi-workstream initiatives end-to-end

title: Group Brand Manager - Vistara
description:
Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories Ltd. is a leading multinational pharmaceutical company based across global locations. Each of our 24,000 plus employees comes to work every day for one collective purpose: to accelerate access to affordable and innovative medicines because **Good Health Can’t Wait**.  
  

We started in 1984 with a modest investment, 20 employees and a bold vision. Today, we have research and development centres, manufacturing facilities or a commercial presence in 66 countries.  
  

For nearly four decades, we have stood for access, affordability and innovation based on the bedrock of deep science, progressive people practices and robust corporate governance. As the pharmaceutical industry evolves and undergoes disruption, we see an opportunity – to strengthen our core further (the next steps) and to build the future (the new bets).  
  

‘The Next and the New’ is how we aim to continue to be the partner of choice – purpose-driven, future-ready and sustainable. Our aim is to reach over 1.5 Bn+ patients across the world by 2030 by growing our core businesses and building for the future with sustainability at the core of our purpose and strategy. Sustainability for us means operating in a manner that respects people, planet and purpose – helping us conserve precious resources, serve our patients, create value for stakeholders, give back to society, fulfil our potential and maintain our integrity and transparency  
  

Dr Reddy’s maintains a work environment, free from discrimination and is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to employ & nurture all qualified diverse workforce without regard to race, colour religion, nationality, sex, age, disability status, genetics, sexual orientation, gender expression, citizenship or any other characteristic or classification protected by applicable law(s) of the country we operate in. We treasure every talent, and recognize merit and diversity in our organization.  
  
  
  

**Job Description  
  
**

**Job Summary  
**  
We are looking for dynamic and experienced Group Brand Manager responsible for identifying new product opportunities, developing business cases, and implementing positioning strategies within designated budgets and organizational guidelines to achieve the market share and revenue targets of the specific vertical. Overseeing the creation of promotional materials, conducting launch meetings, and ensuring effective marketing plan implementation. Providing mentorship to team members and collaborating with sales teams and healthcare professionals to drive Continuing Medical Education (CMEs), aiming to meet market share and revenue targets.  
  
  
  

**Roles & Responsibilities  
**  
• You will be responsible for New Products conceptualization and planning by gathering feedback on unmet therapeutic needs, identifying new product opportunities, and presenting business cases to the vertical head and country head for timely product selection, aligning with long and short-term objectives.  
  

• You will be responsible for branding and promotion of big brand in Rural Geography.  
  
• You will be responsible for New Products Launch Planning by preparing product manuals, designing positioning strategies, and overseeing successful product launches through effective communication and collaboration with regional sales teams.  
  
• You will be responsible for Post-Launch Audit of New Products by coordinating with sales teams, reviewing performance, and initiating corrective actions when necessary to ensure new products meet or exceed sales projections.  
  
• You will be responsible for Branding and Promotions by conducting market research, finalizing positioning strategies, and overseeing effective promotion strategies by collaborating with ad agencies and implementing marketing plans in alignment with business goals.  
  
• You will be responsible for Continuing Medical Education (CME) Programs by identifying CME needs, inviting speakers and doctors, and ensuring successful execution of CME programs to establish lasting relationships with healthcare professionals.  
  
• You will be responsible for leading and developing the team by conducting performance appraisals, mentoring team members, and collaborating with HR for recruitment and talent development to maximize team performance and retention.  
  
• You will be responsible for sales planning and review by gathering feedback from regional sales manager (RSMs), devising region-specific strategies, and incorporating regional needs into the product plan to enhance overall performance.  
  
  
  

**Qualifications  
  
**

**Educational qualification-**A graduate degree in any Science stream  
  
  
  
**Minimum work experience-** 7-10 years of experience in Product Management in pharmaceutical  
  
  
  
**Skills & attributes  
  
Technical Skills  
**  
• Understanding of Indian Pharmaceutical industry- competition, customer behaviour and prescription habits.  
  
• Strategic mindset to develop and implement long-term product strategies that align with the company's overall business objectives.  
  
• Analytical skills to assess market trends, competitor activities, and customer needs for the products in the portfolio.  
  
• Financial management skills to develop and manage budgets, allocate resources effectively, and optimize cost control for the product portfolio.  
  
• Excellent communication skills to convey complex scientific and medical information to diverse audiences, including healthcare professionals, internal teams, and stakeholders.  
  
• Ability to analyze market data, clinical trial results, and sales performance to inform decision-making and product portfolio strategies.  
  
• Ability to adapt to changes in the pharmaceutical market, including advancements in therapies, healthcare policies, and regulatory updates.  
  
**Behavioral Skills:  
**  
• Proactive and visionary mind-set  
  
• Strong networking skills  
  
• Effective people management abilities  
  
• Adaptability and change management skills  
  
• Strategic orientation and decision-making capabilities  
  
  
  

**Additional Information  
  
**

**About the Department  
  
Global Generics India  
**  
Global Generics India business journey began in 1986. In the last three decades, we have grown as a trusted name in the healthcare industry and rank as one of the top 10 Pharma Companies in the Indian Pharma Market (IPM) as per IQVIA MAT (November 2022). Our commitment to Lead Ahead has helped us move ranks from 16th position to 10th position (IPM) in the last four years. We are a fast-growing organisation with double-digit growth and significant market share in domestic markets. Currently, we rank among the top 5 in oncology, anti-allergy and gastrointestinal diseases and the top 10 in a few other therapy areas. Our focus is on leveraging our digital capabilities, collaborations, innovations and inorganic opportunities to become the top 5 companies in the Indian Pharma Market.  
  
  
  
**Benefits Offered  
**  
At Dr. Reddy’s we actively help to catalyse your career growth and professional development through personalised learning programs.  
  
The benefits you will enjoy at Dr. Reddy’s are on par with the best industry standards. They include, among other things and other essential equipment, joining & relocation support, family support (Maternity & Paternity benefits), learning and development opportunities, medical coverage for yourself and your family, life coverage for yourself.  
  
  
  
**Our Work Culture  
**  
Ask any employee at Dr. Reddy’s why they come to work every day and they’ll say, because Good Health Can’t Wait. This is our credo as well as the guiding principle behind all our actions. We see healthcare solutions not only as scientific formulations, but as a means to help patients lead healthier lives, and we’re always attuned to the new and the next to empower people to stay fit. And to do this, we foster a culture of empathy and dynamism. People are at the core of our journey over the last few decades. They have been supported by an enabling environment that buoys individual ability while fostering teamwork and shared success. We believe that when people with diverse skills are bound together by a common purpose and value system, they can make magic.  
  
For more details, please visit our career website at **https://careers.drreddys.com/#!/**

**Job Description  
  
**P&G was founded over 180 years ago as a simple soap and candle company. Today, we're the world’s largest consumer goods company and home to iconic, trusted brands that make life a little bit easier in small but meaningful ways. We've spanned three centuries thanks to three simple ideas: leadership, innovation and citizenship. The insight, innovation and passion of hardworking teams have helped us grow into a global company that is governed responsibly and ethically, that is open and visible, and that supports good causes and protects the environment. This is a place where you can be proud to work and do something that matters.  
  
**Dedication from Us:** You'll be at the core of breakthrough innovations, be given exciting assignments, lead initiatives, and take ownership and responsibility, in creative workspaces where new insights thrive. All the while, you'll receive outstanding training to help you become a leader in your field. It is not just about what you'll do, but how you'll feel: encouraged, valued, purposeful, challenged, heard, and inspired.  
  
**What we Offer:** Continuous mentorship – you will collaborate with peers and receive both formal training as well as day-to-day mentoring from your manager dynamic and encouraging work environment– employees are at the centre, we value every individual and support initiative, promoting agility and work/life balance.  
  
**Job Family Summary:** The Category End to End job family focuses on the comprehensive management of a product category, from inception to customer delivery. This includes strategy development, product innovation, supply chain optimization, and market delivery.  
  
This role contributes to and executes strategies in the team / organization. The focus is on one or more brands, channels, lines, or categories with clearly defined objectives, often at site, country or cluster level. **

Our community includes operations in approximately 70 countries worldwide.

title: Retail Marketing Manager
description:
**About Us :-  
  
**In a short span of 2.5 years since inception, Birla Pivot has evolved into a comprehensive B2B e-commerce platform offering integrated procurement and financial solutions that help businesses become efficient and grow. We offer products across 35 categories, 40,000+SKUs from 300+ brands across **Building Material, Chemicals & Metals**. We launched private labels in 3 categories : Tiles, Ply and Bath ware. With a robust network of suppliers and transporters, we have delivered to 4,000+ pin codes across 375 cities. Our customer base now spans top-tier EPC companies, civil contractors, real estate developers, OEMs, fabricators, manufacturing companies, dealers, and retailers. We connect Sellers, Buyers, Logistics service providers, Lending partners, Payment solution providers on a unified digital backbone thereby creating end to end visibility and providing a B2C like fulfilment experience for the B2B ecosystem.  
  
The evolution of B2B ecommerce is expected to mirror the B2C ecommerce journey, where technology transformed discovery, pricing, fulfilment, and customer experience at scale. Digital penetration today in B2B ecommerce is still under **2%**, indicating massive headroom for scalable digital-first platforms. As the Aditya Birla Group, we are uniquely positioned to transform and shape the way commerce is done across these verticals by leveraging our deep industry expertise and scale. We have built a unique Quote based, Credit linked commerce journey that solves for the needs of B2B commerce with a diverse team that is a mix of deep industry expertise and experience of building complex technology platforms from the ground up. Our goal is to drive this digital adoption and create a distribution platform that can become **the most trusted B2B ecommerce platform in the country.  
  
****Role Overview  
  
**Retail Marketing Manager: to drive on-ground marketing initiatives that strengthen dealer engagement, increase retail traction, and enhance brand visibility at the point of sale. The role requires a self-driven and execution-focused professional with strong experience in retail-driven industries.  
  
The candidate should have hands-on experience in dealer network marketing, retail activations, store branding, influencer engagement, and BTL initiatives that directly contribute to higher footfall, retail sales, and brand awareness.  
  
**Key Responsibilities  
  
****Market Activation & BTL  
  
**

*   Design and implement BTL campaigns, local market activations, and brand visibility programs across key retail markets.
*   Drive footfall at dealer and retail stores through hyperlocal consumer engagement campaigns and improve in-store conversion.
*   Manage activation calendars aligned with seasonal peaks, new launches, and key business milestones
*   Create programs that strengthen retail traction and brand recall at the dealer and store level.  
      
    

**Dealer Activation & Channel Marketing  
  
**

*   Design and execute dealer activation programmes to increase sell-through and channel loyalty
*   Roll out dealer and consumer schemes — trade promos, loyalty incentives, and referral programmes
*   Work closely with channel partners to identify local marketing opportunities and drive joint promotions.  
      
    

**Brand Visibility & Store Branding  
  
**

*   Lead store branding, in-shop branding, and retail visibility initiatives across dealer outlets and partner stores.
*   Conduct regular retail audits to ensure consistent brand standards across all touchpoints
*   Ensure consistent brand presence through POP materials, display units, signage, and retail communication.
*   Identify opportunities to enhance store experience and product visibility.  
      
    

**Awareness Campaigns  
  
**

*   Develop and execute localized brand awareness campaigns targeting consumers and trade segments
*   Coordinate multi-channel campaigns across ground activations, digital amplification, and influencer content  
      
    

**Influencer Engagement  
  
**

*   Develop engagement programs for retail influencers such as architects, interior designers, contractors, masons, carpenters, and applicators.
*   Plan in-shop meets, influencer events, and community engagement activities to build brand advocacy.  
      
    

**Revenue Impact Through Marketing  
  
**

*   Own marketing-driven revenue metrics — footfall, conversion, retail offtake, and scheme ROI
*   Work closely with sales, product and category teams to ensure alignment of retail initiatives with business priorities.
*   Track and report impact of BTL, influencer, and dealer activation on business outcomes  
      
    

Provide market intelligence — competitor activities, consumer insights, trade sentiments — to leadership  
  
**Candidate Profile  
  
**

*   5–8 years of experience in retail marketing in industries such as paints, tiles, bathware, sanitaryware, or other home improvement categories.
*   Proven experience in BTL activations, retail promotions, dealer engagement, and store branding.
*   Highly self-driven, proactive, and execution-oriented, with the ability to independently drive initiatives.
*   Strong coordination and stakeholder management skills with sales teams and channel partners.
*   Willingness to travel frequently across markets.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
We are seeking a dynamic and strategic marketing professional who can drive marketing initiatives and monetization in APAC. This role requires a strong blend of creative marketing thinking, content monetization understanding and performance‑driven content strategies. The ideal candidate will be responsible for elevating the brand across social platforms while unlocking new monetization opportunities.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**1\. 360-degree Marketing Campaigns**

*   Conceptualise and execute IMC across digital, on-air, and off-air activations.
*   Develop innovative marketing initiatives to increase brand awareness and channel reach.
*   Designing organic and paid campaigns keeping in mind brand objectives.

**2\. Social Media Strategy & Brand Building**

*   Develop and execute a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with business and marketing goals.
*   Build a consistent brand voice, visual identity, and content style across all platforms.
*   Stay updated on platform trends, algorithm changes, and emerging formats to maintain competitive advantage.
*   Optimize content for platform-specific formats, trending topics, SEO, and audience engagement.

**3\. Audience Growth & Engagement**

*   Drive rapid follower growth, engagement, and community building through organic and paid tactics.
*   Implement engagement strategies such as polls, live sessions, contests, collaborations, and UGC.
*   Monitor conversations, respond to audience interactions, and uphold brand reputation.

**4\. Content Monetization & Revenue Growth**

*   Identify and leverage platform monetization tools (e.g., YouTube Partner Program, Instagram Bonuses/Reels monetization, Facebook Ad Breaks, influencer partnerships, affiliate programs).
*   Develop new revenue streams including branded content, sponsorships, partnerships, and digital product sales.
*   Analyse performance to optimize content for higher RPM, watch time, retention, and conversion.

**5\. Performance Tracking & Analytics**

*   Track KPIs such as reach, engagement, CTR, follower growth, conversion rates, and content revenue.
*   Prepare weekly/monthly reports with insights, ROI analysis, and data-driven recommendations.
*   Use analytics tools (Meta Insights, YouTube Analytics, Google Analytics, Sprout/Hootsuite, etc.).

**6\. Cross-Functional Collaboration**

*   Collaborate with marketing, design, SEO, product, and sales teams to align communication and campaign execution.
*   Develop integrated campaigns that connect social media strategy with broader business goals.

**Required Skills & Qualifications**

*   Bachelor’s degree in marketing, Communications, Digital Media, or related field.
*   3–6 years of experience managing social media for brands, creators, or digital businesses.
*   Strong knowledge of content monetization models across YouTube, Meta, X, TikTok, and emerging platforms.
*   Excellent storytelling, writing, and content ideation skills.
*   Proficiency in analytics tools and data-driven decision-making.
*   Ability to understand marketing funnels, brand positioning, and digital consumer behaviour.

**Preferred Qualifications**

*   Experience in 360-degree marketing in broadcast media/OTT/entertainment/digital content platforms
*   Knowledge of influencer marketing and partnership execution.
*   Familiarity with performance marketing and revenue attribution models.
*   Ability to manage multiple channels and fast-paced content calendars.

**Key Attributes**

*   Initiative-taker with a strong sense of ownership
*   Creative thinker with a data-oriented growth mindset.
*   Highly organized and meticulous with agility.
*   Strong communication and collaboration skills with a problem-solving attitude.
*   Passion for digital media, pop culture, and content trends.

HDFC Securities is one of India’s leading stockbroking firms and a subsidiary of HDFC Bank. As we scale our next-generation investment platforms, we are looking for a dynamic Digital Marketing Manager who can bridge the gap between performance-driven paid acquisition and long-term organic growth. If you are passionate about the intersection of data, search intent, and user experience, come join us!

  

**Roles and Responsibilities**

*   **Integrated Strategy:** Devise and execute a holistic digital roadmap that balances high-velocity paid campaigns with sustainable organic growth (SEO/AEO).
*   **Paid Acquisition Leadership:** Lead paid channels (Google Search, Meta, App Campaigns, PMax, and Ad Networks) to meet aggressive monthly acquisition and trading targets.
*   **Organic & Search Optimization:** Drive organic visibility by overseeing SEO strategies, including technical audits, content roadmaps, and adapting to the evolving landscape of Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
*   **Funnel Optimization:** Analyze the entire conversion funnel—from click to first trade—identifying friction points and implementing strategies to improve conversion rates (CRO).
*   **Creative & Content Management:** Collaborate with agencies to develop high-performing ad creatives, landing pages, and SEO-friendly content that resonates with the BFSI audience.
*   **Data & Insights:** Publish daily and monthly performance reports for stakeholders, providing top-level insights on CAC, LTV, and organic share of voice.
*   **Stakeholder & Agency Management:** Lead relationships with external partners and internal tech teams to ensure seamless campaign execution and compliance approvals.
*   **Innovation & Testing:** Stay ahead of industry trends, managing beta projects with Google and Meta, and experimenting with AI-driven marketing tools to drive efficiency.

**Qualifications and Skills**

*   **Experience:** 4–7 years in digital marketing, with a proven track record in the BFSI sector preferred.
*   **Hybrid Expertise:** Deep understanding of the biddable media landscape (Search, Social, Programmatic) combined with a solid grasp of SEO principles and discovery-based search.
*   **Technical Toolkit:** High proficiency in Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, DV360, Google Analytics (GA4), AppsFlyer, and SEO tools (e.g., SEMrush, Ahrefs, or Search Console).
*   **Analytical Mindset:** Strong logical thinking with the ability to translate complex data into actionable growth strategies.
*   **Communication:** Excellent written and verbal English skills, with the ability to present performance updates to senior leadership.
*   **Attributes:** Proactive, commercially focused, and detail-oriented, with a drive to scale quality user acquisition.

title: Manager, Marketing
description:
The Global Finance & Technology Network (GFTN) is a not-for-profit organisation established by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) in 2024 to harness technology and foster innovation for more efficient, resilient, and inclusive financial ecosystems through global partnerships. GFTN organises convening forums, offers advisory services on innovation ecosystems, provides access to transformative digital platforms, and invest in technology startups with the potential for growth and positive social impact through its venture fund.

  

We seeking an experienced Marketing Manager to own and execute end-to-end marketing campaigns for our India based programmes. In this role, you will coordinate across multiple marketing functions, manage stakeholders, and be instrumental in, enhancing brand awareness, and attracting top-tier participants and partners to our India programmes.

  

**Job Description:**

**Campaign Ownership & Execution:**

*   Own end-to-end marketing campaigns for assigned India programme from strategy through to execution and post-event analysis with advice from Singapore HQ
*   Coordinate across multiple SG marketing functions (performance marketing, content, creative, marketing operations) and India local team to deliver cohesive, high-impact campaigns.
*   Develop and manage campaign timelines, budgets, and deliverables with strong attention to detail and project management rigour.

  

**Campaign Management and Execution:**

*   **Email Marketing:** Draft and execute email marketing campaigns (EDMs) designed to engage and convert, including segmented lists, targeted messaging, and lifecycle nurture sequences.
*   **Social Media Strategy:** Lead the creation and implementation of social media campaigns and content that drive event awareness and engagement across platforms such as LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube.
*   **Content Creation and Management:** Produce engaging content including videos, interviews, and promotional materials such as brochures, OOH ads,. Manage onsite photography and videography to capture key moments and create compelling visual content.
*   **Digital Marketing and Website Management:** Own website content updates and accuracy for assigned forums. Work closely with performance marketing and marketing operations teams on paid campaigns and digital assets.
*   Develop and manage timelines, budgets, and performance metrics.
*   **Stakeholder Communication:** Present campaign plans, performance updates, and post-event analysis to senior management.

  

**Performance Analysis and Reporting:**

*   Monitor and analyse campaign performance against KPIs.
*   Provide regular reporting and actionable insights to leadership.
*   Continuously optimise campaigns based on data and market feedback.

  

**Our Ideal Candidate:**

*   Minimum of 6 years of marketing experience with a proven track record of hands-on experience executing successful campaigns for large-scale events.
*   **Email and Social Media Expertise:** Strong hands-on experience in both email marketing and social media strategy, with a proven ability to drive engagement and ROI through these channels.
*   **C**reative Tools, **CMS and CRM Proficiency:** Comfortable working with content management systems (e.g., WordPress, Webflow) and CRM platforms (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce) to manage content, track campaigns, and leverage data for decision-making. Proficient at working with Canva, Adobe Illustrator and other similar tools
*   **Excellence and Ownership:** Meticulous attention to detail with high standards for quality. Takes full accountability for outcomes and proactively drives solutions.
*   **Growth Mindset:** Eager to learn, adapt, and continuously improve. Curious and proactive about leveraging AI tools to enhance efficiency and performance.
*   **Strategic Thinker and Storyteller:** Evaluates complex situations, solves problems creatively, and crafts compelling narratives that engage target audiences.
*   **Cross-Functional Collaboration:** Experience working within cross-functional teams, including sales, partnerships, operations, and content, to align marketing efforts with event objectives and ensure cohesive execution.

title: Digital Growth & Marketing Head
description:
**Role Summary**

**Incredibleindriya Beauty Essentials Pvt. Ltd. is seeking a future-forward, high-impact Digital Growth & Marketing Head** to lead our D2C, marketplace expansion, and overall marketing strategy. This role is designed for a "Digital Native" who possesses a unique blend of traditional e-commerce mastery, comprehensive brand marketing leadership, and a deep proficiency in AI-driven growth strategies.

As the central execution owner and leader of the marketing team, you will bridge the gap between leadership vision and tangible market outcomes with founder-level accountability. You will not only own the P&L and revenue targets but will also be responsible for architecting a modern, tech-enabled, full-funnel growth engine. We are looking for a leader who views AI as a core competitive advantage to automate marketing workflows, personalize customer journeys, and derive deep insights from complex data sets.

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\. Marketing Team Leadership & Agency Management**

*   **Team Direction:** Act as the strategic and operational head of the marketing team, aligning brand voice, creative output, performance marketing, and retention efforts under a unified growth strategy.
*   **Partner Management:** Own relationships with external performance marketing, marketplace optimization, and tech agencies.
*   **KPI Accountability:** Set clear performance metrics, ensure organizational accountability, and align agency outputs with core business priorities.

**2\. Multi-Channel E-commerce & Marketplace Growth**

*   **D2C Strategy:** Own the end-to-end Shopify website strategy, ensuring a premium, high-converting experience that reflects our heritage fragrance brand.
*   **Marketplace Optimization:** Treat **Amazon, Nykaa, Flipkart, and Myntra** as critical revenue and discovery pillars for domestic and global markets.
*   **Tactical Execution:** Lead keyword strategy, brand defense, competitor conquesting, listing SEO, and review velocity across all platform stores.
*   **Brand Standards:** Ensure pricing discipline and high-converting asset/A+ content excellence across Shopify and all marketplace channels.

**3\. AI-Driven Growth & Automation**

*   **Workflow Efficiency:** Identify and implement AI tools to automate repetitive marketing, reporting, and operational tasks, increasing team bandwidth for high-level strategy.
*   **Content & Creative Acceleration:** Leverage Generative AI and LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to streamline creative briefs, copy testing, and asset production at scale across social and digital channels.
*   **Predictive Analytics:** Utilize AI-driven insights for demand forecasting, churn prediction, and advanced customer segmentation to optimize marketing spend.

**4\. Revenue, P&L & Growth Ownership**

*   **Full P&L Accountability:** Own the end-to-end Shopify and marketplace P&L, including revenue targets, gross margins, and contribution economics.
*   **Operating Plans:** Build and manage rigorous monthly, quarterly, and annual operating plans to scale our brands from early traction to sustainable revenue milestones.
*   **Financial Balance:** Expertly balance aggressive growth with cash flow, inventory efficiency, and long-term profitability.

**5\. Website, Funnel & Conversion Optimization (CRO)**

*   **UX/UI Oversight:** Drive continuous conversion rate improvements across the Shopify Homepage, Product Detail Pages (PDP), and Checkout funnels.
*   **Data-Led Personalization:** Use heatmaps, A/B testing tools, and AI personalization engines to remove conversion friction and increase Average Order Value (AOV).
*   **Retention Marketing:** Optimize post-purchase customer journeys and trust elements (UGC, reviews, guarantees) to maximize LTV.

**6\. Performance Marketing Strategy & Oversight**

*   **Channel Strategy:** Oversee performance marketing strategy and budget allocation across Meta, Google, and emerging digital channels.
*   **Economics:** Define and defend CAC, ROAS, and LTV scaling thresholds.
*   **Funnel Mastery:** Guide full-funnel acquisition strategy (TOF–MOF–BOF) and drive optimization direction through weekly performance reviews.

**7\. Strategic Planning, Product, & Inventory Alignment**

*   **Roadmap Translation:** Convert high-level leadership priorities into clear execution roadmaps and actionable growth levers.
*   **Inventory Forecasting:** Own demand forecasting to synchronize marketing campaigns, marketplace sales events, and product launches with inventory levels to reduce stockouts or margin leakage.
*   **Pricing & Positioning:** Manage pricing architecture and offer structures for hero products, entry-level SKUs, and premium ranges to maximize conversion without eroding brand equity.
*   **Executive Reporting:** Prepare structured performance updates, projections, and decision summaries for founders and stakeholders.

**Technical Proficiencies & AI Stack**

*   **E-commerce & Marketplaces:** Shopify (Expert), Amazon Seller Central & Amazon Ads, Nykaa Partner Portal, Flipkart Seller Hub, and Myntra Partner Platform.
*   **Digital Advertising Platforms:** Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, Instagram Ads, GA4.
*   **AI & Automation:** \* _Generative AI:_ Expert use of LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude) for strategy, marketing copy, and creative briefs.
*   _Workflow Automation:_ Experience with Zapier, Make.com, or similar automation bridges.
*   _Advanced Analytics:_ Familiarity with AI-powered attribution (e.g., Triple Whale, Northbeam) and predictive modeling.

**Core Strengths & Ideal Fit**

*   **Digital Fluency & Agility:** Staying ahead of platform updates, marketplace algorithm shifts, and emerging tech trends; ability to pivot strategies quickly based on real-time data.
*   **Analytical Rigor:** The ability to look past the "what" and find the "why" behind omni-channel sales and marketing numbers.
*   **Founder-Level Accountability:** Treating the business’s capital and brand equity as if it were your own.
*   **Industry Match:** A proven track record of scaling premium or luxury brands in the beauty, cosmetics, and fragrance industry across global or highly competitive markets.
*   **Early Adopter:** You are already using AI to increase your own productivity and the performance of your marketing teams.

Incredibleindriya Beauty Essentials Pvt. Ltd. is an equal-opportunity employer. We are building the future of fragrance through the perfect marriage of heritage scents and cutting-edge digital execution.

title: Head – Digital, Growth & Analytics (B2B)
description:
**About Angel One:**

  

Angel One is one of India’s fastest growing fin-techs, on a bold mission to make investing simple, smart, and inclusive for every Indian. With over 3+ crore clients, we’re building at scale – and building for impact.

  

Our Super App helps clients manage their investments, trade seamlessly, and access financial tools tailored to their goals. We are working to build personalized financial journeys for our clients, powered by new-age tech, AI, Machine Learning and Data Science.

  

We're a builder's company at heart. You’ll have the space to experiment, the freedom to move with velocity, and the mandate to make bold, user-first decisions – every single day.

The vibe? Think less hierarchy, more momentum. Everyone has a seat at the table and a shot to build something that lasts.

  

Be part of a team that’s scaling sustainably, thinking big, and building for the next billion.

  

**Why You'll Love Working at Angel One!**

  

*   **Tech Systems that run at Scale:** From AI to real-time data infra, you’ll work on tech that’s ahead of the curve and solve problems that truly matter.
*   **Build one of India’s Leading Fintech Platform:** We’re not just disrupting finance – we’re shaping how billion Indians access wealth.
*   **Own It. Drive It. Scale It:** You’ll have the freedom to lead, the resources to build, and the opportunity to leave your mark.
*   **Empowered Growth:** We invest in your growth and empower you to explore your full potential.
*   **Exceptional Benefits:** Our comprehensive benefits package includes health insurance, wellness programs, learning & development opportunities, and more.

**Job Title:** Head – Digital, Growth & Analytics

**Location:** Delhi / NCR

**What you will do:**

  

The Head – Digital, Growth & Analytics will be responsible for driving end-to-end digital growth, customer lifecycle management, and data-driven decision-making across the B2B business. This role combines full-stack digital ownership with advanced analytics leadership, enabling scalable acquisition, engagement, monetization, and retention of clients through integrated digital and data ecosystems.

The role will act as a strategic enabler for business growth, leveraging analytics, AI, and digital transformation to optimize performance across all levers of the B2B lifecycle.

  

**Key Responsibilities:**

  

**Head of Digital**

  

*   **Customer Lifecycle & Journey Design**
*   Own and architect end-to-end customer journeys across onboarding, activation, engagement, cross-sell/up-sell, retention, and reactivation.
*   Identify key inflection points, drop-offs, and opportunity zones across the lifecycle.
*   Drive omnichannel journey orchestration across app, web, CRM, partner ecosystem, and field channels.
*   Implement experimentation frameworks (A/B testing, cohort analysis) to continuously optimize journeys.

  

*   **Content & Brand Strategy**
*   Build and lead the B2B content and brand function aligned to business objectives.
*   Develop persona-based, funnel-stage content strategies mapped to lifecycle journeys.
*   Establish measurement frameworks to track content effectiveness (engagement → conversion → revenue impact).
*   Ensure consistent brand narrative and communication across all digital touchpoints.

  

*   **Digital Acquisition & Growth**
*   Own digital client acquisition strategy for the SB network across paid and organic channels.
*   Optimize channel mix across performance marketing, SEO, ASO, partnerships, and growth loops.
*   Build and scale organic acquisition engines for long-term cost efficiency and sustainability.
*   Continuously improve CAC, LTV/CAC ratios, and conversion funnels.

  

*   **Refer & Earn (Growth Loop Ownership)**
*   Own end-to-end strategy, execution, and optimization of the Refer & Earn program.
*   Maximize high-quality acquisition at minimal CAC through referral-led growth loops.
*   Build fraud detection and misuse prevention frameworks.
*   Drive continuous optimization via incentive design, cohort performance, and attribution analysis.

  

*   **SB Experience & NPS**
*   Own and drive SB (Sub-Broker) experience and satisfaction (NPS).
*   Identify and address key experience pain points across digital and assisted journeys.
*   Partner with product, ops, and field teams to improve experience-led retention and engagement.

  

**Head of Analytics**

  

*   **Business & Revenue Analytics**
*   Lead end-to-end revenue analytics across all segments and product lines.
*   Drive deep-dive analytics for:
*   Overall revenue performance
*   ITPP & ProInsight product analytics
*   Identify growth drivers, leakages, and optimization opportunities.

  

*   **Market Share & Competitive Intelligence**
*   Own daily market share tracking and analysis.
*   Provide actionable insights on competitive positioning, trends, and shifts.
*   Enable leadership with real-time intelligence for strategic decisions.

  

*   **AOP Planning & Performance Tracking**
*   Drive Annual Operating Plan (AOP) analytics, including planning, tracking, and variance analysis.
*   Ensure alignment between targets, execution, and outcomes.
*   Build frameworks for forward-looking projections and scenario planning.

  

*   **Lifecycle & Growth Analytics**
*   Own analytics for:
*   Digital journeys performance
*   Refer & Earn effectiveness
*   Hyperlocal growth initiatives (GBP, microsites, digital avatars)
*   Develop propensity models, churn prediction frameworks, and lifecycle segmentation.

  

*   **Reporting, Dashboards & Data Infrastructure**
*   Own and scale dashboarding ecosystem for real-time decision-making.
*   Lead automation of business and finance reporting (monthly/weekly/daily).
*   Drive data model optimization and governance frameworks.

  

*   **Field, Distribution & Contest Analytics**
*   Provide analytics support across:
*   Field teams & contests
*   Distribution performance
*   COE (Centre of Excellence) initiatives
*   Enable performance tracking and incentive optimization frameworks.

  

*   **Advanced Analytics & Advisory**
*   Lead advisory analytics to support strategic initiatives and leadership decisions.
*   Drive cross-functional deep dives to solve complex business problems.

  

*   **AI & Digital Transformation**
*   Champion adoption of AI/ML models and automation frameworks across digital and analytics functions.
*   Build capabilities in:
*   Attribution modelling
*   Predictive analytics
*   Personalization engines
*   Lead data-driven digital transformation initiatives to improve efficiency and scalability.

  

*   **Key Outcomes / Success Metrics**
*   Growth in client acquisition, activation, and retention rates
*   Improvement in CAC, LTV, and channel efficiency
*   Increase in cross-sell/up-sell and revenue per client
*   Improvement in SB NPS and engagement metrics
*   Accuracy and impact of analytics-driven decisions
*   Adoption of AI-led and data-driven frameworks
*   Reduction in manual reporting and operational inefficiencies

  

**Who you are**

*   10–15+ years of experience in Digital, Growth, and Analytics leadership roles
*   Strong expertise in:
*   Performance marketing & growth strategy
*   Customer lifecycle management
*   Advanced analytics & data modelling
*   Experience in building and scaling teams and functions from ground up
*   Proven track record of driving business impact through data and digital
*   Strong stakeholder management across business, product, tech, and leadership teams

  

**At Angel One, our thriving culture is rooted in Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI).**

_As an Equal opportunity employer, we wholeheartedly welcome people from all backgrounds irrespective of caste, religion, gender, marital status, sexuality, disability, class or age to be part of our team. We believe that everyone's unique experiences and viewpoints make us stronger together. Come and be a part of #OneSpace\*, where your individuality is celebrated and embraced._
