The platform offers 360° financial solutions — investments, taxes, insurance, and budgeting — for individuals and families, powered by **NovaAI**, a 24/7 personal finance assistant for real-time guidance.

  

**Role Overview**

We are looking for a strategic and hands-on **Head of Performance Marketing & Growth** to own end-to-end customer acquisition, activation, and revenue growth. This leader will define the growth roadmap, scale high-performing channels, optimize CAC/LTV, and build a best-in-class performance engine across paid, organic, and lifecycle channels. You will partner closely with Product, Data, Design, Content, and Sales to drive measurable growth while building and mentoring a high-impact performance team.

  

**Key Responsibilities**

*   Own and scale user acquisition, activation, and monetization across paid and organic channels
*   Define growth strategy, quarterly targets, budgets, and forecasting aligned with business goals
*   Lead paid media across Google Ads, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, Programmatic, and emerging channels
*   Optimize CAC, LTV, ROAS, and conversion rates through experimentation and data-driven
*   decisions
*   Build and manage a high-performing performance marketing and growth team
*   Drive experimentation: A/B testing, funnel optimization, audience segmentation, and creative testing
*   Partner with Product and Engineering on onboarding, retention, and lifecycle growth initiatives
*   Establish robust analytics, attribution, and reporting frameworks (MMPs, GA, dashboards)
*   Collaborate with Design and Content to develop scalable creative systems
*   Stay ahead of fintech, growth, and martech trends; evaluate and implement new tools

  

**Requirements**

*   12+ years of experience in performance marketing and growth, with leadership exposure
*   Deep expertise in Apple Ads, Google Ads, Meta Business Suite, analytics, attribution, and experimentation
*   Proven track record of scaling acquisition while improving CAC/LTV and ROI
*   Experience in fintech preferred
*   Strong understanding of funnels, cohorts, retention, and lifecycle marketing
*   Exceptional analytical, strategic thinking, and stakeholder communication skills
*   Experience building and leading teams in fast-paced environments

  

**What We Offer**

*   Opportunity to build and own the growth engine at a high-impact fintech
*   Direct influence on product, brand, and revenue strategy
*   Collaborative culture with strong leadership visibility
*   Competitive compensation and growth-oriented incentives

title: Director - Growth (Mumbai)
description:
**About KNOLSKAPE:**

KNOLSKAPE is the world’s largest experiential learning technology company, empowering organizations to become future-ready through AI-enabled, human-centric, and immersive learning solutions. Operating in over 20 countries, the company has partnered with 400+ global enterprises and more than 500,000 learners across industries and geographies. Our proprietary 4E Learn2Perform Framework—Evaluate, Educate, Experience, Enable—drives measurable outcomes through end-to-end AI-powered experiential learning. With the industry’s largest simulation portfolio and custom creation capabilities via our award-winning GENIE platform, we help organizations rapidly deploy realistic, interactive learning for core and contextual skills across Digital, Leadership, Culture, Role, Domain, and Organizational Readiness. title: Global Head of Strategic Growth - Business Optimization & Transformation
description:
**About RateGain**

RateGain Travel Technologies Limited is a global provider of AI-powered SaaS solutions for travel and hospitality, working with 13,000+ customers and 700+ partners across 160+ countries. RateGain helps travel and hospitality businesses accelerate revenue generation through acquisition, retention, and walletshare expansion.

Today, RateGain is one of the world’s largest processors of electronic transactions, price points, and travel intent data, enabling revenue management, distribution, and marketing teams across hotels, airlines, metasearch companies, package providers, car rentals, travel management companies, cruises, and ferries to drive better business outcomes.

Founded in 2004 and headquartered in India, RateGain works with 33 of the Top 40 Hotel Chains, 4 of the Top 5 Airlines, 7 of the Top 10 Car Rental companies, and all leading Destination Marketing Organizations, Online Travel Agents, and metasearch platforms, including 25 Global Fortune 500 companies, unlocking new revenue every day.

Recognized globally for its innovation and impact, RateGain has been named Best Digital Marketing Agency by HotelTechReport Awards and Best Channel Manager by the World Travel Tech Awards. The company has also been certified as a Great Place to Work® in the USA, Spain, and India, with recognition in India for seven consecutive years and in the top 100 in India. In 2025, RateGain was honored as Emerging Company of the Year at The Economic Times Awards for Corporate Excellence, named among Deloitte India Technology Fast 50 for the sixth time, and won Excellence in Best AI Solution Showcase for UNO VIVA at the CII National AI Awards 2025, among other industry recognitions.

  

**Mission:**

Build and institutionalize RateGain’s growth engine by systematically identifying, prioritizing, and executing the highest return growth opportunities across products, markets, and go -to-market, ensuring capital is deployed deliberately to maximize growth and profitability.

  

**Purpose & Strategic Significance**

This role exists to answer one question, every quarter: “Where should RateGain invest next to grow fastest and most profitably?” You will understand how the company allocates capital across products, markets, and go-to-market, ensuring every investment is deliberate, sequenced, and accountable for outcomes.

  

**Primary Responsibilities:**

**1\. Portfolio Strategy**

• Classify current product lines: DaaS, Distribution, MarTech, and sub-products across growth, share, and profitability to define clear invest/scale / maintain / harvest/exit postures.

• Build a forward -looking view of the business across:

\- Core revenue engines (driving current cash flow)

\- Growth accelerators (scaling businesses)

\- Future bets (emerging opportunities)

• Translate this portfolio view into explicit capital allocation decisions, including:

\- Where to increase investment (product, GTM, partnerships)

\- Where to protect margins and optimize

\- Where to reduce or redeploy resources

• Own the annual portfolio strategy and quarterly refresh cycles, stress-testing assumptions with data, scenario planning, and market signals.

  

**2\. Market Expansion & Segmentation**

• Define where to play & how to win across geos, verticals, and customer segments.

• Build clear go / no -go frameworks for expansion across: Geos, Verticals, Customer segments, including hotel chains vs independents, OTAs, airlines, DMOs, cruise, car rental, TMCs, etc.

• Size opportunities with rigorous TAM/segment economics/win-thesis modeling, and define: Expected growth potential, Time to scale, Required investment intensity,

• Recommend entry strategies for each priority segment: Direct, Channel-led, or M&A.

• Identify white spaces within existing markets:

\- Under-penetrated geographies,

\- High -potential sub -segments,

\- Cross-sell/bundling opportunities across the portfolio.

  

**3\. New Product & Category Strategy**

• Identify adjacencies across data, distribution, MarTech , and AI -led experiences

• Balance investment across: Core business optimization, adjacent growth, future category creation

• Drive build vs buy vs partner decisions with clear ROI logic.

  

**4\. Go -to -Market Investment Allocation**

• Decide where to: Add or scale Sales capacity, expand CS/Account Management, build partner-led growth channels, pull back underperforming investments.

• Own: CAC payback, LTV/CAC, Coverage, and productivity models.

  

**5\. Customer -Centric Growth & Conversion**

• Anchor growth strategy in deep customer understanding and real use-cases.

• Translate insights into: Stronger value propositions, Better onboarding and activation, Improved conversion and expansion.

• Identify and fix growth bottlenecks across the funnel.

  

**6\. Pricing, Packaging & Monetization**

• Own pricing as a structured growth lever.

• Drive: Value-based pricing, Packaging and bundling, cross-product monetization.

• Eliminate: Revenue leakage, Discount inconsistency, Legacy pricing constructs.

  

**7\. Deal Economics & Commercial Discipline**

• Define guardrails for: Discounting, Deal approvals, Commercial consistency.

• Partner with Sales to improve win rates through value articulation.

  

**8\. Growth System & Execution**

• Build a repeatable growth system that combines: Strategic prioritization, Data-led decision making, and Continuous experimentation.

• Align Product, Sales, and CS around: Shared growth priorities & clear success metrics.

  

**9\. Growth Intelligence & Planning**

• Build a single source of truth for growth performance and ROI.

• Integrate: Market signals, Cohort performance, Win/loss insights.

• Embed strategy into: Planning, Forecasting, Board -level reporting.

  

**Functional KPIs**

• Increase share of ARR from new products and new markets.

• Drive growth from existing customers by improving retention (NRR) and multi-product adoption (attach rates) across priority segments.

• Optimize CAC payback and sales productivity by segment.

• Drive adherence to portfolio and capital allocation decisions across business units.

• Improve ACV and price realization, while reducing discount variance.

• Grow expansion ARR through cross -sell, upsell, and packaging improvements.

  

**Strategic KPIs**

• Drive sustained multiyear revenue growth through a deliberate growth portfolio.

• Improve Rule of 40 performance through disciplined allocation of growth investments.

• Enhance quality and predictability of ARR (balanced mix of new, expansion, and renewals).

• Increase contribution of new growth bets (products, markets, segments) to revenue.

• Strengthen competitive positioning through portfolio, market, and monetization choices.

• Build leadership and board confidence in capital allocation and growth strategy.

  

**Key Competencies:**

• Strong portfolio thinking with the ability to balance core performance, scaling bets, and future growth opportunities across the business.

• Deep command of SaaS growth metrics (NRR, LTV/CAC, payback, Rule of 40) and ability to

translate metrics into clear decisions.

• Ability to define consistent growth metrics across teams, linking strategy to execution.

• Expertise in one or more growth levers (product, market, GTM, monetization) with the ability to integrate them into a unified growth strategy.

• Operates effectively at both strategic and execution levels, sets direction while staying close to outcomes.

• Structured, high -judgment decision maker with the ability to prioritize, make trade-offs, and act under ambiguity.

• Influences senior stakeholders and drives alignment on high-impact decisions without formal authority.

  

**Education & Experience :**

• Mandatory: Bachelor’s and/or Master’s degree from a Tier -1 institution (India or global

equivalent).

• 15–18 years across strategy and growth roles in SaaS, tech, or data-driven businesses.

• Blend of top -tier strategy exposure and operating experience (Corporate Strategy, Growth, Revenue, or GM roles).

• Proven track record of driving growth through product, market expansion, GTM, and monetization levers with measurable impact.

• Experience operating in multi-product, global environments and scaling across geos & segments.

• Strong ability to translate strategy into execution in cross -functional settings.

• Exposure to M&A, partnerships, or new market entry preferred.

• Experience in a listed or high-governance environment is a plus.

  

  

We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and are committed to providing a diverse and inclusive workplace. We welcome and encourage applications from all qualified individuals, regardless of race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, genetic information, disability, or veteran status.

title: Director of Organic Growth
description:
**About Learneo  
**Learneo is a platform of builder-driven businesses, including Course Hero, CliffsNotes, LitCharts, Quillbot, Symbolab, and Scribbr, all united around a shared mission of supercharging productivity and learning for everyone. We attract and scale high growth businesses built and run by visionary entrepreneurs. Each team innovates independently but has a unique opportunity to collaborate, experiment, and grow together, and they are supported by centralized corporate operations functions, including HR, Finance and Legal.

**Role Overview  
**We are looking for a strategic, high-ownership Director of Organic Growth to lead and scale QuillBot’s organic acquisition engine across all major discovery surfaces. This role goes well beyond traditional SEO—you will own the full spectrum of organic growth, including Search Engine Optimization (SEO), App Store Optimization (ASO), Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), and Extension Store visibility (Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, and others). As a Director, you will set the vision, build and manage the roadmap, and lead the existing SEO & Organic Growth team. You’ll partner closely with Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, and International teams to embed organic growth into QuillBot’s product and go-to-market strategy. Your work will directly influence organic traffic, sales, install volume, revenue, and brand visibility on a global scale.

**Responsibilities**

*   **Strategy & Leadership**
    *   **Organic Growth Strategy**: Define and own the overarching organic growth strategy spanning SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Store optimization. Set quarterly and annual OKRs tied to impressions, clicks, MAU, installs, and sales. 
    *   **Team Leadership**: Manage, mentor, and develop the SEO & Organic Growth team. Foster a culture of experimentation, accountability, and continuous learning. Identify and hire for key capability gaps as needed.
    *   **Roadmap Ownership**: Build and maintain a prioritized organic growth roadmap. Balance quick wins with longer-term strategic bets. Present plans and progress to senior leadership, including the CEO.
    *   **Cross-Functional Partnership**: Serve as the organic growth voice in cross-functional planning with AI, Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, Marketing Operations, and International Expansion teams. Ensure organic considerations are embedded in product launches, site architecture decisions, and content strategy.
    *   **Product Roadmap Influence**: Act as a key influencer of the Product roadmap by surfacing organic growth opportunities, user intent data, and search landscape insights that shape feature prioritization, new product bets, and go-to-market timing.
*   **Search Engine Optimization (SEO)  
    **
    *   **SEO Program Ownership**: Own end-to-end SEO performance across QuillBot’s web properties. Drive strategy across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO to secure and defend top positions for high-value keywords.
    *   **Technical SEO**: Lead technical audits and partner with Engineering to resolve crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, site speed, structured data, and mobile-responsiveness issues at scale.
    *   **Content & Keyword Strategy**: Oversee keyword research, content gap analysis, and on-page optimization. Collaborate with the Content team to ensure every page is strategically targeted and continuously improved.
    *   **Link Building & Authority**: Direct link-building and digital PR strategies to grow domain authority. Evaluate backlink quality and build partnerships with authoritative sites.
    *   **Algorithm Resilience**: Monitor Google algorithm updates, diagnose ranking fluctuations, and quickly adapt strategies to protect and grow organic traffic.
*   **Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)**
    *   **GEO Strategy**: Develop and execute a strategy to maximize QuillBot’s visibility in AI-generated answers and citations across generative search experiences (e.g., Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, etc).
    *   **Content for LLMs**: Work with Content and Product to structure information, schema markup, and authoritative content so that generative engines accurately surface and recommend QuillBot.
    *   **Measurement & Experimentation**: Define GEO-specific metrics, build tracking frameworks, and run experiments to understand how generative surfaces drive traffic and conversions.
    *   **Competitive Intelligence**: Monitor how competitors are cited in generative answers and identify opportunities to increase QuillBot’s share of voice.
*   **App Store Optimisation (ASO)**
    *   **ASO Program Ownership**: Own QuillBot’s organic discoverability and conversion rates in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.
    *   **Listing Optimization:** Optimize app titles, subtitles, descriptions, keywords, screenshots, and preview videos to improve search rankings and download conversion rates.
    *   **Ratings & Reviews**: Develop strategies to increase the volume and quality of positive ratings and reviews, and work with Product to address recurring user feedback themes.
    *   **A/B Testing**: Design and run store listing experiments to continuously improve conversion. Leverage tools like Google Play Experiments and third-party ASO platforms.
    *   **Market-Specific ASO**: Partner with the International Expansion team to localize and optimize listings for priority markets.
*   **Extension Store Optimisation**
    *   **Extension Visibility**: Own QuillBot’s presence and discoverability in the Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, Microsoft Edge Add-ons, and Firefox Add-ons.
    *   **Listing & CRO**: Optimize extension titles, descriptions, screenshots, and feature graphics. Improve install conversion rates through iterative testing.
    *   **Ratings & Review Strategy**: Drive rating volume and quality for extensions. Coordinate with Product and Support to address negative feedback and reduce churn.
    *   **Cross-Channel Synergy**: Align extension store strategy with SEO and ASO efforts to create a unified organic discovery experience across web, app, and extension surfaces.
*   **Analytics, Reporting & Insights**
    *   **Performance Measurement**: Build and maintain dashboards tracking organic performance across all channels (SEO, ASO, GEO, Extension Stores). Define KPIs and ensure the team is data-driven in decision-making.
    *   **Executive Reporting**: Deliver regular performance updates and strategic insights to senior leadership. Translate complex organic data into clear narratives with actionable recommendations.
    *   **Tool Stack**: Evaluate and manage the organic growth tool stack (e.g., Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Sensor Tower, Screaming Frog, etc).

**Qualifications**

*   8–10 years of progressive experience in SEO and/or organic growth, with at least 3 years in a people-management role.
*   Global experience: demonstrated ability to drive organic growth across multiple markets, regions, and languages—not limited to English-speaking audiences.
*   Demonstrated success managing organic growth for a high-traffic website (+20M monthly active users) and a consumer app with significant install volume.
*   Proven track record of securing and defending #1 positions for competitive keywords
*   Proven ability to build organic visibility from zero for new product launches in highly competitive markets — taking a product from no search presence to top-ranking positions against established incumbents.
*   Deep expertise across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO, with a strong grasp of how search engines crawl, index, and rank content.
*   Hands-on experience with ASO for iOS and/or Android apps, including keyword optimization, listing experiments, and review management.
*   Strong understanding of the generative AI search landscape and emerging GEO best practices.
*   Proficiency with industry tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, and at least one ASO platform (preferably Sensor Tower).
*   Experience working with CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress) and comfort with basic HTML/CSS.
*   Excellent communicator who can present data-driven strategies to senior leadership, including C-level stakeholders.
*   Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.

**Bonus Points**

*   Experience at a SaaS, EdTech, or consumer-tech company with a freemium or subscription business model.
*   Hands-on experience with multilingual and multi-regional SEO and ASO strategies.
*   Familiarity with structured data, schema markup, and Knowledge Graph optimization.
*   Experience with programmatic SEO or large-scale page generation strategies.
*   Experience optimizing browser extension listings in the Chrome Web Store or equivalent platforms.
*   Background in conversion rate optimization (CRO) as it relates to organic landing pages and store listings.
*   Comfortable working across time zones in a fully remote, globally distributed team.

**Why Join QuillBot?**

*   **Ownership & Impact**: Take full ownership of organic growth across every discovery surface and directly influence QuillBot’s trajectory.
*   **Scope & Challenge**: Lead a function that spans SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Stores—a rare opportunity to shape organic strategy holistically.
*   **Collaborative Culture**: Work with a passionate, innovative team across Content, Marketing, Product, and Engineering.
*   **Remote Flexibility**: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely with flexible hours to balance professional and personal life.
*   **Professional Growth**: QuillBot values learning and development, offering opportunities for skill enhancement and career advancement.

**Benefits & Perks**

*   Competitive salary and annual bonus
*   Medical coverage
*   Life and accidental insurance
*   Vacation & leaves of absence (menstrual, flexible, special, and more!)
*   Developmental opportunities through education & developmental reimbursements & professional workshops
*   Maternity & parental leave
*   Hybrid & remote model with flexible working hours
*   On-site & remote company events throughout the year
*   Tech & WFH stipends & new hire allowances
*   Employee referral program
*   Premium access to QuillBot

\*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process. 

Research shows that candidates from underrepresented backgrounds often don't apply for roles if they don't meet all the criteria. We strongly encourage you to apply if you're interested: we'd love to learn how you can amplify our team with your unique experience!  
  
This role is eligible for hire in India.  
  
We are a virtual-first company and have employees dispersed throughout the United States, Canada, India, Israel, Germany, and the Netherlands. We have a market-based pay structure that varies by location. The base pay for this position is dependent on multiple factors, including candidate experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed. You may also be eligible to participate in our bonus program and may be offered benefits, and other types of compensation.  
  
#Learneo  
  

**Equal ​Employment Opportunity Statement ​(EEO)**

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity and ​inclusion within our company.  ​We will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender ​identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, ​veteran status, or ​ability status. We will ensure that individuals who are differently abled are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment as provided to other applicants or employees. Please contact us to request accommodation.

title: Marketing & Growth Lead
description:
2Base Technologies is at a deliberate stage of building its marketing function, and this role owns it end to end, which includes the strategy, the team, and the results.

  

We are a technology services company with over 16 years of delivery experience. Our primary markets are the United States and the United Kingdom.

  

This is not a role for someone who has contributed to a marketing function. It is a role for someone who has built one and who has personally owned a lead target, made channel investment decisions, managed a team, and can show what happened as a result.

  

**What You Will Own**

*   Qualified lead targets and pipeline contribution from marketing
*   Team direction and weekly priorities
*   Ideal Customer Profile definition and content strategy approval
*   Channel strategy and budget prioritization across inbound and outbound
*   Budget allocation across channels
*   Marketing analytics and attribution
*   Hiring and building the marketing team
*   Outbound marketing strategy and execution oversight
*   Email nurture strategy
*   Marketing and sales alignment
*   Marketing performance reporting to leadership

  

**What you will not own**

Writing content, designing assets, or running paid campaigns directly. This is a leadership and ownership role, where you set the direction, build the team, and are accountable for the outcomes.

  

**Experience:**

*   **8-15 years** in marketing, with a minimum of 3-4 years in a senior or strategic marketing role.
*   Has personally owned a lead target, not contributed to one.
*   Has worked in or closely with a technology services, SaaS, or AI company.
*   Has managed a small team.
*   Has run inbound and outbound marketing simultaneously.
*   Has set up or significantly improved marketing analytics and attribution.
*   Has operated in or marketed to US or UK markets, which is strongly preferred and not optional.
*   Experience working with cross-functional teams including sales and business development.

  

**Education:**

*   MBA in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field preferred
*   Relevant certifications or professional training in digital marketing, growth marketing, or marketing analytics will be considered an advantage

  

**Mindset:**

*   Thinks in terms of outcomes, not activities
*   Self-directed and sets priorities independently without waiting for direction
*   Comfortable making decisions with incomplete information and owning the result
*   Honest when things are not working and does not manage upward by hiding problems
*   Understands that the quality of the team they build determines the quality of the results

  

**What We Are Not Looking For**

*   Someone whose measure of marketing success is impressions, follower growth, or content volume without a connection to pipeline
*   Someone who has only ever worked in large teams where personal ownership was unclear
*   Someone who reaches for tools before understanding the problem
*   Someone with no exposure to US or UK B2B buyers

  

**Benefits**

A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

title: Head of Marketing
description:
**About the Opportunity**

A fast-growing holistic health and wellness company, led by a globally recognized health coach and integrative medicine expert, is looking for a Marketing Head to drive brand growth, digital strategy, and revenue across its ecosystem of programs, consultations, and learning platforms.

This is a leadership role for someone passionate about purposeful work at the intersection of health, content, and digital innovation.

  

**What You'll Do**

*   Own and execute the end-to-end marketing strategy — brand, digital, performance, and content.
*   Scale online programs and optimize website journeys to drive leads, engagement, and conversions.
*   Lead and mentor digital, creative, and content teams in a collaborative, remote-first setup.
*   Build high-impact campaigns across email, SEO, paid media, and partnerships.
*   Drive PR and brand positioning initiatives aligned with company vision.
*   Identify and execute strategic collaborations within the wellness ecosystem.

  

**What We're Looking For**

title: Head of Demand Generation
description:
**The Company Behind the Products**

  

Every business talks about “better customer conversations.” SaaS Labs builds products that actually make them happen.

  

What are we building? Through a powerful ecosystem including **JustCall**, CallPage, and ServiceAgent.ai, we empower thousands of businesses to move beyond talk and drive truly meaningful customer conversations.

  

Where are we now? Supported by a community of over 6,000 customers, a dedicated team of 300+ across India, Poland and the US, and the strategic backing of Peak XV and Base10 Partners, we are fundamentally redefining the art of customer conversation - and we're just getting started.

  

What's it like to work here? Total ownership. We’re a team that moves with purpose, builds with ambition, and loves seeing our work make a real impact. And, if you're already nodding along, let's start the conversation.

  

**Our Flagship Product**

  

With **JustCall**, we’re leading the innovation on how sales and service teams connect with their customers- using AI - across calls, texts, emails, WhatsApp, and whatever comes next! It’s a multichannel communication system that helps 7000+ of our customers serve theirs better- with 24/7 AI Agents, on-point integrations, and other forward-looking features.

  

**Your mission**

  

Own sourced pipeline across SMB, Mid-Market, and Commercial segments. Build and scale the outbound engine through ICP segmentation, account scoring, and intent-led targeting. Drive the PLG-to-SLG motion by converting high-intent self-serve users into sales opportunities without disrupting the flywheel. Lead inbound demand across content, SEO, G2, and community to improve CAC efficiency. Translate revenue goals into integrated campaigns that BDRs and AEs can execute effectively. Run events end-to-end with built-in outreach and follow-up motions. Build partner-led demand as a scalable growth channel, and use RevOps data to drive decisions and execution.

  

**Your Toolkit**

  

*   Built demand gen programmes from scratch in a lean, high-growth environment - you're a builder, not an inheritor of mature playbooks
*   Run field events end-to-end - speaker selection, venue, pre-event outreach, post-event Sales follow-up, sourced pipeline measurement
*   Managed a demand budget with full accountability for spend efficiency, CAC, and pipeline ROI
*   Operated in B2B SaaS selling to sales, revenue ops, or customer-facing teams - you understand the pain JustCall solves
*   Worked with HubSpot, Salesforce, or equivalent - and know how to wire attribution cleanly

  

**Extras That Give You An Edge**

  

*   You've run ABM programmes with coordinated outbound + field + digital touches across named accounts
*   You've operated in a competitive SaaS category (UCaaS, CCaaS, Sales Engagement, or adjacent)
*   You've localised demand programmes across multiple geos without losing strategic coherence
*   You've built partner-led demand: co-marketing, integration partner activation, or reseller enablement
*   You've used intent data platforms - 6sense, Bombora, G2 Buyer Intent, to sharpen outbound and ABM prioritisation

  

**Benefits**

  

*   Take time off when you need it. We trust you to manage your energy and schedule responsibly.
*   We don’t track hours, just impact. Work when you’re most productive, as long as you show up for your team.
*   Hybrid working model with 4 in-office days per week
*   Competitive pay that reflects your skills, experience, and the value you bring.
*   Once a year, we also trade Zoom calls for real hugs and high-fives, gathering somewhere nice and sunny to connect, recharge, and celebrate.
*   Comprehensive physical and mental health coverage for you, your partner, and your family, because care shouldn’t come with fine print.

  

SaaS Labs takes pride in being an equal opportunity employer. We believe diverse teams build better products, which is why we're committed to taking hiring or any employment decision regardless of race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex, marital status, ancestry, disability, genetic information, veteran status, gender identity, sexual orientation, or any other characteristic.

  

Curious about what we're building? Follow us on **LinkedIn** to be the first to know!

title: Digital Demand Generation Campaign Manager (Digital Hub)
description:
**We help the world run better  
  
**At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.  
  
**What You’ll Do  
  
**As a Campaign Manager, you will collaborate with a variety of stakeholders to facilitate the creation, management, and outcome tracking of campaigns. You will partner with Sales Development Executives (SDEs), Demand Managers, Account Executives (AEs), Territory Engagement Managers (TEMs), and SAP Partners to stimulate pipeline generation, formulate campaign strategies, oversee the development of digital campaigns, and drive progression of pipeline through initiatives. The primary objective is to establish comprehensive pipeline coverage to meet and exceed Corporate sales quotas while continually enhancing pipeline conversion to revenue.  
  
**Key Responsibilities  
  
**

*   Lead and oversee major digital programs and campaigns by coordinating with various stakeholders to ensure program success.
*   Review demand needs, identify pipeline and progression gaps where digital campaigns can be planned and executed to meet the gap.
*   Strategize and build campaigns plan in coordination with various stakeholders, e.g. Sales, Marketing, Partners, Digital Hub to drive pipeline attainment and progression in the market unit.
*   Orchestrate End to End demand generation campaigns from planning, execution to closure. Ensuring various teams involved in the campaign are aware of their tasks and responsibilities as well as the status progress of the campaigns.
*   Identify key gaps in pipeline progression and take initiatives and/or programs to unblock bottlenecks that hinder pipeline progression.
*   Management of existing campaigns, resolutions to issues blocking the campaigns, and tracking the progression of them.
*   Create comprehensive campaign blueprints and communicate campaign details effectively to the field teams.
*   Evaluate the outcomes of each campaign, accurately document outcomes, and communicate outcomes to business stakeholders.
*   Work with other Digital Hub functions, such as Sales Development Executives (SDEs), Digital Solution Advisory (DSA), Digital Value Advisory (DVA), digital assets, digital insights team, and wider SAP team to plan and orchestrate high impact Demand Generation campaigns.
*   Work with SAP partners to foster growth in their demand generation proficiency. This involves active collaboration aimed at elevating partners’ capabilities and maturity in orchestrating effective demand generation campaigns.  
      
    

**What You Bring  
  
**

*   Exceptional relationship building skills, ability to collaborate with internal stakeholders across levels from colleagues to senior management, to drive campaigns and programs success
*   Strong Project and Program Management skills in managing multiple digital programs across stakeholders
*   Exceptional oral and written executive communication skills in English
*   Ability to use Microsoft Office software, particularly Excel, PowerPoint, Word and Outlook
*   Passion to challenge, improve and innovate at both a personal and organizational level
*   Knowledgeable about how organizations work; knows how to get things done through formal and informal channels
*   \>5 years professional experience at enterprise level, with a minimum 3 years in driving digital campaigns, outbound campaigns, marketing and/or sales programs.
*   Expert in demand generation campaigns planning, orchestration and execution
*   Experience in project or program management driving campaigns or sales programs from planning to closure.
*   Experience working with SDR/BDR to drive digital and outbound campaigns is desired.
*   Bachelor's degree in Business Administration or Marketing or Information Technology required from an accredited university.  
      
    

**Meet your team  
  
**This market unit position entails close collaboration and coordination with India Corporate and Partner Driven leaders and stakeholders to drive pipeline creation and progression success to achieve and overachieve sales quotas.  
  
**Bring out your best  
  
**SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.  
  
**We win with inclusion  
  
**SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. title: Lead Associate - Category Marketing
description:
**About The Company  
  
****Who are we?  
  
**Myntra is India’s leading fashion and lifestyle platform, where technology meets creativity. As pioneers in fashion e-commerce, we’ve always believed in disrupting the ordinary.  
  
We thrive on a shared passion for fashion, a drive to innovate to lead, and an environment that empowers each one of us to pave our own way. We’re bold in our thinking, agile in our execution, and collaborative in spirit.  
  
Here, we create MAGIC by inspiring vibrant and joyous self-expression and expanding fashion possibilities for India, while staying true to what we believe in.  
  
We believe in taking bold bets and changing the fashion landscape of India. We are a company that is constantly evolving into newer and better forms and we look for people who are ready to evolve with us.  
  
From our humble beginnings as a customization company in 2007 to being technology and fashion pioneers today, Myntra is going places and we want you to take part in this journey with us.  
  
Working at Myntra is challenging but fun - we are a young and dynamic team, firm believers in meritocracy, believe in equal opportunity, encourage intellectual curiosity and empower our teams with the right tools, space, and opportunities.  
  
Role Overview  
  
As a Lead Associate for Category Marketing (BPC), you will be at the heart of one of Myntra’s most dynamic portfolios. You will be responsible for defining how beauty brands come to life on the platform, driving high-impact launches, and crafting end-to-end demand generation strategies that resonate with millions of shoppers. This role sits at the intersection of brand storytelling, platform innovation, and data-driven growth, requiring a visionary who can navigate the evolving beauty landscape and build deep connections with diverse customer segments.  
  
Roles and Responsibilities  
  

*   End-to-End Brand Co-Marketing: Partner with leading global and homegrown beauty brands to design and execute comprehensive 360-degree marketing campaigns. You will own the relationship from concept to closure, ensuring seamless integration across onsite, social, and CRM channels.
*   Cohort Strategy & Customer Journeys: Develop a robust strategic plan for various customer cohorts on Myntra Beauty. You will be responsible for building tailored customer journeys that move users from discovery to advocacy, ensuring high retention and lifetime value across different demographics.
*   Gen Z Beauty Strategy: Lead the charge in capturing the next generation of beauty enthusiasts. Conceptualize and drive a dedicated Gen Z strategy that leverages trends, authenticity, and "digital-first" content to make Myntra the preferred destination for young shoppers.
*   Search & Discovery Enhancement: Elevate the search experience from a customer point of view. You will advocate for an intuitive, frictionless discovery process, ensuring that the platform’s interface reflects how beauty customers actually want to browse and shop.
*   Feature Innovation: Collaborate closely with technical platform leads and feature owners to advocate for and implement desired app functionalities. You will bridge the gap between marketing needs and technical execution to build a best-in-class shopping interface.
*   Integrated Marketing Collaboration: Work in lockstep with the broader marketing team to synchronize category goals with brand campaigns, influencer marketing, social media strategy, performance marketing, and affiliate programs. \* Creative Innovation & Storytelling: Move beyond standard templates to conceptualize high-visual-impact campaigns. Define the visual language for BPC categories, ensuring creative assets drive both brand love and conversion.
*   High-Impact Launches: Own the end-to-end marketing roadmap for new brand and product launches within the BPC space, ensuring maximum market "buzz."
*   Performance Analytics: Deep-dive into storefront metrics and data to extract actionable insights, correcting funnel leakages and optimizing CTRs through rigorous experimentation.  
      
    

**Qualifications & Experience  
  
**

**Amazon.com strives to be Earth's most customer-centric company where people can find and discover virtually anything they want to buy online. Amazon India is launching a new service, Strategic Brand services aimed at offering dedicated support to top-tiered brands to grow with Amazon. Under this service, Brand Specialists will work on identifying and improving key customer inputs for growth such as content, marketing and stock availability among others. Apart from this, the Brand Specialists will also help brands leverage Amazon’s tools and programs to improve on their business inputs.  
  
We are seeking creative, goal-oriented and highly entrepreneurial people to join our exciting and fast-paced team.

title: Enterprise Marketing Manager, India
description:
**Summary  
**At Apple, we help businesses reimagine how people work. By combining powerful hardware, intuitive software, and a secure ecosystem, we enable organisations to innovate and achieve more.  
  
Imagine transforming the way India’s leading businesses and institutions operate. We believe organisations deserve experiences that spark innovation, creativity and productivity. By creating powerful tools, resources and stories, we empower enterprise customers to unlock the potential of Apple products and transform how people work — extending these benefits to education to help institutions modernise learning for the future.  
  
We’re seeking an Enterprise Marketing Manager to lead Apple’s marketing efforts with India’s most influential businesses. You will define and execute Apple’s enterprise marketing strategy—working with CIOs, IT leaders, decision makers, and partners to showcase the unique value of Apple at work. You’ll develop compelling narratives, launch integrated programs, and influence cross-functional teams to accelerate adoption. You will also support education initiatives where appropriate, ensuring alignment with Apple’s broader mission.  
  
**Description  
**In this role, you will lead Apple’s Enterprise marketing strategy for India while supporting high-impact education initiatives. You’ll engage deeply with enterprise customers, institutional leaders and partners to understand their needs and drive awareness and adoption of Apple solutions. You’ll communicate Apple’s unique value proposition, develop and implement campaigns, collaborate cross-functionally, and track performance to drive continuous improvement.  
  
**Responsibilities  
**

*   Setting strategic direction and driving execution of marketing programs and channel campaigns across enterprise markets, with targeted education initiatives as appropriate.
*   Creating key customer-facing assets, presentations, marketing resources and digital content to enable partners, sales teams and enterprise customers.
*   Leading integrated marketing programs to drive awareness, preference and adoption of Apple products across business verticals.

*   Collaborating closely with Product Marketing, Sales, Marcom, PR and Retail to drive program priorities, narratives and results.
*   Interpreting marketing research and data analytics to inform messaging, product roadmaps and go-to-market strategies.
*   Monitoring emerging market trends to strategically position Apple for future success in Enterprise and Education.
*   Tracking performance of initiatives and overall customer momentum in enterprise, with secondary focus on education projects.

Please contact us to request accommodation.

**

*   Proven success developing and executing marketing programs that deliver measurable impact.

*   Flexibility to travel within India (up to 30% of the time).  
      
    

**Preferred Qualifications  
**

*   Ability to craft compelling, benefit-based positioning, messaging and product differentiation for enterprise customers.
*   Expertise in developing customer-facing content with unyielding attention to detail.
*   Excellent communication, presentation and storytelling skills with senior audiences; demonstrated ability to build high-impact marketing narratives and programs.

This is a solutions & offerings marketing role focused on helping shape, package, and communicate Persistent’s Data, Analytics, and AI offerings to the market. The role works closely with leaders to create compelling messaging, solution narratives, campaign assets, and sales enablement content that support pipeline creation and market visibility.

title: Growth Marketing Manager
description:
**Who We Are**

  

MAVI is on a mission to build the modern finance team and accelerate talent ROI by 10x by connecting the best talent in the world with high-performing US companies. We’re building the world’s largest network of top-tier finance talent, using an AI-powered platform for sourcing, vetting & matching, and disrupting a legacy $100Bn+ industry.

  

**About The Role**

We are looking for a driven and data-savvy Growth Marketing Manager to own and scale our demand-generation and supply engine. You will be the architect of **multi-channel campaigns**, **spanning email automation**, **LinkedIn outreach**, events with a relentless focus on pipeline growth and measurable ROI.

  

This is a hands-on, high-ownership role. You will strategize, execute, analyse, and iterate, wearing both the strategist and operator hat. If you love turning data into decisions and campaigns into revenue, this role is for you.

  

**What You’ll Do**

  

*   Design and manage **end-to-end email campaigns**, **nurture sequences**, **drip workflows**, and broadcasts using platforms like Reply.io and Apollo
*   Run **A/B tests** on subject lines, copy, and CTAs to continuously improve open rates, CTR, and conversions; maintain list hygiene and segmentation.
*   Monitor campaign engagement and iterate on targeting, messaging, and creative to improve lead qualification and volume.
*   Own **top-of-funnel lead generation** across inbound and outbound channels, ensuring a steady flow of MQLs to the sales team aligned with ICP criteria.
*   Work closely with sales to align on lead quality, follow-up cadences, and feedback loops.
*   Track and report on key KPIs, MQLs, SQLs, CPL, CAC, email/LinkedIn engagement, and pipeline influence via dashboards.
*   Spot underperforming campaigns early and make data-backed pivots to strategy, messaging, or channel mix.
*   Plan and execute campaigns to support MAVI's talent supply pipeline, working with internal ops teams to identify gaps and running targeted outreach across email and LinkedIn to attract, engage, and re-engage candidates at the right time.

  

**Must-Have Skills & Experience**

  

*   3-6 years of **hands-on experience in growth marketing, demand generation**, or digital marketing, preferably in a B2B or SaaS environment.
*   Proven proficiency with **email automation platforms** such as HubSpot, Marketo, Mailchimp, Apollo or Reply.io
*   Demonstrated success in running end-to-end lead generation campaigns with measurable pipeline impact.
*   Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data, spot trends, and translate insights into action without waiting for direction.
*   Comfort working in a fast-paced environment with shifting priorities and a bias toward experimentation.

  

**Qualifications**

  

*   Bachelor's/Master’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
*   3-6 years of relevant experience in a B2B marketing environment.
*   Self-starter who can manage multiple projects and campaigns simultaneously with minimal hand-holding.
*   Comfortable presenting campaign results and strategy recommendations to leadership.

  

**Why You Should Join**

  

*   Impact: You’re not just another cog in the machine; you’ll help build the talent acquisition motion ground up that powers the entire business.
*   No Bureaucracy: Work directly with founders, move fast, and own meaningful projects. We’re playing to win here. This is a startup and we’re looking for new ideas, bold moves, and scrappiness.
*   Competitive Pay: We believe in sharing the upside with those who build it :)
*   Remote-first: Work from anywhere, but expect high velocity and deep collaboration.

  

**Equal Opportunity Statement**

  

At MAVI, we celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all team members. We welcome applicants of every background, identity, and life experience. Employment decisions are based on business needs, qualifications, and merit, without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

title: Growth and Demand Generation lead
description:
**About Signeasy**

  

Contracts run businesses. We are unlocking the intelligence inside them.

  

Signeasy started fifteen years ago by making signing effortless and helping the world go paperless. Today, we are focused on Intelligent Contract Management. Contracts define revenue, risk, compliance, and growth, yet they remain scattered, static, and underused across most organizations.

  

Signeasy’s Intelligent Contract Management platform helps modern teams organize, search, track, and extract insights from every agreement they manage using AI native workflows.

  

2026 is our biggest year yet. We are scaling demand aggressively across SMB and mid-market segments and building a modern, efficient, AI forward growth engine

  

**About the role**

  

This is a hands-on role with direct revenue ownership.

  

As the Growth and Demand Generation Lead, you will own how demand is created, captured, nurtured, and expanded across the customer lifecycle. Your mandate is to drive trials, leads, and pipeline while continuously improving efficiency and reducing cost of acquisition.

  

This role goes far beyond paid campaigns. You will build and operate a unified demand engine across **paid and AI powered paid channels, email and lifecycle programs, product led growth loops, content driven demand, and sales assisted motions**.

  

You will think in systems, build workflows, run experiments, and scale what works. If you get energy from revenue, compounding impact, and operational excellence, this role is built for you.

  

**What you will own**

  

You will design and run the end to end demand funnel across acquisition, onboarding, retention, and expansion.

  

You will own **paid channels and AI driven paid experimentation**, with a strong focus on CAC efficiency and high intent demand for upper SMB and mid market buyers.

  

You will make **email and lifecycle marketing a core revenue driver**, building programs across onboarding, activation, retention, upsell, cross sell, and win back. Segmentation, personalization, and timing will be central to your approach.

  

You will build and scale **product led demand loops**, including templates, free tools, workflows, and in product sharing triggers that generate qualified demand from real usage.

  

You will partner closely with the content and product marketing teams to turn launches, narratives, and thought leadership into pipeline generating programs.

  

You will work tightly with Sales, SDRs, RevOps, and Customer Success to support **sales assisted growth**, account based plays, deal acceleration campaigns, and expansion motions.

  

You will also set up **AI powered workflows for sales**, enabling better targeting, enrichment, personalization, prioritization, and follow up across the revenue team.

  

**Growth channels you will actively build and scale**

  

Paid and AI powered paid channels across Google, LinkedIn, Meta, and emerging platforms

AI native discovery in partnership with the content team across platforms like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini, including prompt level optimization

Email and lifecycle programs spanning acquisition, onboarding, retention, expansion, and reactivation

Product led growth loops through templates, utilities, and in product sharing

Influencer, creator, and ecosystem led growth through trusted operator voices and practitioner communities

Sales assisted and signal driven growth including warm outbound, account based plays, and deal acceleration

  

**What success looks like**

  

A predictable, scalable pipeline engine with improving acquisition efficiency

Email and lifecycle established as meaningful contributors to revenue

Multiple non SEO growth channels scaled beyond experimentation

Clear linkage between growth activity and pipeline, ARR, retention, and expansion

Sales teams operating with better signals, context, and AI powered workflows

  

**What we are looking for**

  

Five to eight years of experience in B2B SaaS growth or demand generation

Proven ownership of pipeline creation and acquisition efficiency

Deep hands on expertise in email and lifecycle marketing

Strong experience running paid programs with a focus on ROI

Comfort building systems, workflows, and experiments from scratch

AI forward mindset with practical experience using modern tools

Strong collaboration skills across marketing, sales, and product

  

**Why this role**

  

You will build the demand engine for Signeasy’s Intelligent Contract Management and eSignature businesses at a critical moment of scale. You will work closely with leadership, have real ownership, and see direct revenue impact from your work.

If you are excited by building demand, scaling efficiently, and turning experimentation into durable growth, we want you here.

title: Growth Manager
description:
At Coram AI, we’re reimagining video security for the modern world. Our cloud-native platform uses computer vision and AI to help businesses stay safe, make smarter decisions, and move faster; from real-time alerts to seamless clip sharing and multi-site visibility.  
  
You’ll be joining a small, fast-moving team that values clarity, craftsmanship, and impact. Every person here has a voice, ships meaningful work, and helps shape how AI can make the world safer and more connected.  
  
**The Role  
  
**We are an engineering-first go-to-market organization. We don't just run campaigns; we build scalable growth engines. We are looking for a Demand Generation Manager who can sit at the intersection of our elite GTM engineering team and our high-accountability sales culture. You will be responsible for taking our sophisticated AI suite of products to market. In our culture, we value outcomes over activity. You will have the freedom to experiment but the responsibility to measure, iterate, and scale what works.  
  
**Responsibilities  
  
**

*   Build and manage the Coram growth engine across conventional channels (Email, Webinars, Physical Events) and digital experiments
*   Work side-by-side with our engineering team to automate lead gen workflows and build custom GTM tools that give us a 10x edge over legacy incumbents
*   Develop structured GTM playbooks for our core industries (Warehousing, Education, and Manufacturing) translating technical AI capabilities into clear value for operational buyers
*   Own full funnel execution by focusing on data from first touchpoint to closed-won, ensuring every marketing dollar is an investment in a repeatable system  
      
    

**Skills And Qualifications  
  
**

*   Ability to work in an onsite environment (5 Days WFO: Bangalore)
*   Education Background- IITs/IIMs preferred
*   3-5 years of experience in B2B growth/demand generation, including ownership of pipeline targets, ideally in a fast-paced startup or high-growth environment
*   Experience in writing high-converting copy for a physical security director with the ability to explain the logic of a multi-step automation workflow to engineers or other technical stakeholders
*   Ability to strategically assess various marketing channels on a strategic level (You don't just see a webinar; you see a data-collection opportunity, a content-recycling loop, and a lead-scoring variable)
*   Experience using LLMs and automation tools to 5x your own productivity, and an enthusiasm to build similar AI agents for our marketing stack
*   Enthusiasm for collaborating with engineers and other technical stakeholders
*   Proven experience operating in in high agency, 0 → 1 environments
*   Resilient in challenging and fast-paced environments
*   Exceptional written and verbal communication skills in English, with the ability to influence at all levels.  
      
    

**What We Offer  
  
**

*   Competitive compensation package
*   100% Employer-paid medical, dental, vision, and base life insurance
*   Flexible paid time off and paid holidays
*   Equity in a rapidly growing company
*   Referral bonuses
*   The latest Apple tech and unlimited tools so you can win  
      
    

We're on a mission to transform a $50B+ legacy industry by bringing the power of cutting-edge multimodal LLMs and computer vision to real-world security and operations. From firearm detection to intelligent access control, our AI-native platform turns every camera and sensor into a smart system that enhances safety, efficiency, and awareness.  
  
Founded by Ashesh Jain (ex-Lyft Level 5, PhD Cornell) and Peter Ondruska (ex-Lyft, PhD Oxford), Coram AI is backed by Battery Ventures, Mosaic, and 8VC, have raised over $30M, and were named to the CB Insights AI 100 as one of the most promising AI companies in the world. If you're excited to work on mission-critical AI that makes an impact in the real world, we’d love to meet you.

title: Manager - Strategic Marketing - Hyderabad/Bengaluru
description:
**Summary  
  
****Position Summary  
  
******Manager | Go-to-Market  
  
****Role Summary  
  
**We are looking for a Manager to partner with U.S.-based Strategic Marketers—including portfolio marketing leaders, national marketing leaders, and Business Chief Marketing Officers (BCMOs)—to lead strategic marketing initiatives and service offering activations. This role sets campaign goals, guides cross-channel execution, and strengthens collaboration across teams. Managers own performance reporting, annual planning, and operational standardization, while coaching team members and ensuring marketing efforts align to business priorities and a client-first mindset.  
  
**Key Responsibilities (What You’ll Do)  
  
****Annual Planning, Strategy & Alignment  
  
**

*   Drive annual marketing planning in partnership with business stakeholders and portfolio marketers
*   Lead competitive analysis and strategic alignment across priorities
*   Collaborate with Client Account Teams, Research & Insights, and Market Intelligence to inform portfolio-level initiatives
*   Integrate insights into campaign planning and standardize operations to improve efficiency and impact  
      
    

**Integrated Campaign Execution & Leadership  
  
**

*   Help manage planning and delivery of integrated campaigns across channels (thought leadership, events, podcasts, digital platforms)
*   Define campaign goals and oversee content development and production
*   Ensure brand consistency across deliverables and channels
*   Guide demand generation strategy and execution
*   Leverage marketing platforms and tools to optimize execution and automate reporting
*   Mentor and develop team members through feedback, performance management, and career development  
      
    

**Measurement, Reporting & PR Performance  
  
**

*   Prepare and present performance reports to leadership
*   Establish benchmarks and reporting cadences; provide strategic recommendations
*   Direct media strategy for PR campaigns
*   Analyze coverage and sentiment; recommend improvements to increase visibility and engagement  
      
    

**Skills & Competencies  
  
**

*   Content & Brand Strategy — Shapes content vision, ensures brand integrity, and defines brand strategy for consistent communications and reputation management
*   Quality & Standards Leadership — Establishes review processes and maintains quality standards across deliverables
*   Technology, Data & Analytics — Aligns tech investments to business goals; optimizes data platforms; drives adoption of analytics tools for insights
*   Strategic Planning & Portfolio Direction — Develops long-term marketing strategy; connects campaigns to lead gen and retention; aligns initiatives to business objectives
*   Stakeholder Engagement & Influence — Develops engagement strategies and manages senior leader relationships to support organizational priorities
*   Innovation, Change & Crisis Management — Drives innovation, fosters problem-solving culture, and supports crisis communications as needed
*   Project & Financial Management — Oversees strategic marketing projects, standardizes operations, and manages large-scale budgets
*   Team Leadership & Development — Sets leadership tone, coaches team members, and supports career growth
*   Problem Solving & Continuous Improvement — Solves complex challenges, manages crises, and drives process improvements  
      
    

**Experience Required (Strategic Marketing Execution & Portfolio Oversight)  
  
**

*   Execute nurture campaigns; monitor funnel metrics; partner with sales to improve conversion
*   Lead account-based and opportunity-based marketing; coordinate with sales; track outcomes
*   Manage SEO/SEM implementation; partner with web/content teams to improve search visibility
*   Manage email calendars, workflows, and segmentation to evaluate effectiveness
*   Qualify leads, track engagement, and support audience segmentation for demand gen
*   Manage paid advertising with media teams; optimize performance using analytics
*   Lead web development projects and UX/UI enhancements to improve experience and accessibility
*   Drive PR campaigns; manage media relationships for consistent messaging and coverage
*   Produce and manage press releases; coordinate media outreach; monitor coverage
*   Manage content calendars and production workflows; maintain brand voice and quality
*   Lead digital activations (video, podcasts, webcasts/webinars), including schedules, budgets, and vendors
*   Plan and coordinate social campaigns (posting schedules, engagement strategy)
*   Plan and execute events (logistics, budgets, stakeholder communications)  
      
    

**Qualifications  
  
**

*   10–13 years of relevant experience in B2B / professional services marketing with strong integrated marketing and communications capability
*   Demonstrated ability to coach and mentor team members and manage performance
*   MBA preferred (any Master’s degree acceptable)  
      
    

**Work Environment & Shift Timings  
  
**Deloitte offers a hybrid working environment designed to support flexibility and business requirements.  
  

*   In-office: Tuesday and Wednesday are designated work-from-office days
*   Schedule options:

*   Staggered: 11:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m. and 7:00 p.m.–11:00 p.m., or
*   2:00 p.m.–11:00 p.m.

*   Business expectation: Availability until 11:00 p.m.
*   Shift timings and work arrangements may be temporarily adjusted based on business needs

title: SBS - Assistant Brand Manager, India Consumables
description:
**Description  
  
**Amazon.com strives to be Earth's most customer-centric company where people can find and discover virtually anything they want to buy online. Amazon India is launching a new service, Strategic Brand services aimed at offering dedicated support to top-tiered brands to grow with Amazon. Under this service, Brand Specialists will work on identifying and improving key customer inputs for growth such as content, marketing and stock availability among others. Apart from this, the Brand Specialists will also help brands leverage Amazon’s tools and programs to improve on their business inputs.  
  
We are seeking creative, goal-oriented and highly entrepreneurial people to join our exciting and fast-paced team.  
  
**About The Role  
  
**As a Brand Specialist, you will focus on delivering 5 core focus areas for the brand: Selection, demand generation, catalogue quality, business advice and availability.  
  
The person who joins the leadership team in this position must share our passion and commitment for serving our customers. This ideal candidate should have experience in forging and building brand relationships. Some understanding of planning product cycles and selling online is preferred. The right candidate will be flexible, action and results oriented, self-starting and have strong analytical skills. He or she must have a proven track record in taking ownership, driving results and moving with speed to implement ideas in a fast-paced environment. He should be entrepreneurial with the confidence to make independent, data-driven decisions. The candidate must demonstrate the ability to succeed at: planning and forecasting, and driving an online business. The candidate must be an effective communicator in working with some of Amazon’s most important partners and vendors, as well as with internal colleagues and groups.  
  
**Responsibilities  
  
**This person will have responsibility for:  
  
Building selection: Identify selection gaps. Track brand’s offline catalogue to ensure all relevant selection is present on Amazon.  
  
Demand generation: Responsible for demand generation. This includes working with other members on the category management team to create a marketing calendar based on vendor's objectives  
  
Business Advice: Support participation of brand in Amazon programs  
  
Availability: Ensuring continuous availability of products  
  
Catalogue Quality on Amazon: Ensuring the best input from brand is updated for customer interface on Amazon Detail Pages through perfect Images, Product descriptions, etc.  
  
Key job responsibilities

**Amazon.com strives to be Earth's most customer-centric company where people can find and discover virtually anything they want to buy online. The Brand Specialist will work on offering dedicated support to top-tiered brands to grow with Amazon by identifying and improving key customer inputs for growth such as content, marketing and stock availability among others. Apart from this, the Brand Specialists will also help brands leverage Amazon’s tools and programs to improve on their business inputs.  
  
We are seeking creative, goal-oriented and highly entrepreneurial people to join our exciting and fast-paced team.  
  
**This Person Will Have Responsibility For  
  
**Building selection: Identify selection gaps. Track brand’s offline catalogue to ensure all relevant selection is present on Amazon.  
  
Demand generation: Responsible for demand generation. This includes working with other members on the category management team to create a marketing calendar based on vendor's objectives  
  
Business Advice: Support participation of brand in Amazon programs  
  
Availability: Ensuring continuous availability of products  
  
Catalogue Quality on Amazon: Ensuring the best input from brand is updated for customer interface on Amazon Detail Pages through perfect Images, Product descriptions, etc.  
  
**Basic Qualifications  
  
**

*   1+ years of account management, project or program management or buying experience
*   Master's degree in management, business administration, economics, engineering, marketing

*   Experience managing large amounts of data

title: Demand Generation Manager
description:
**About StackGen**

  

StackGen is building the agentic OS for DevOps — a platform that enables autonomous operations across cloud infrastructure, site reliability, and observability. Our AI agents make cloud environments self-building, self-governing, self-healing, and self-optimizing.

  

The platform spans three areas:

  

AI SRE — A major focus for 2026, our autonomous SRE offering uses AI agents to detect, diagnose, and remediate production incidents, closing the gap between alert and resolution. One of the fastest-growing segments in the market and a primary demand generation priority.

  

Infrastructure and Platform Engineering — AI-powered automation built on enterprise-grade Terraform that delivers DevEx 2.0: extending AI beyond coding to infrastructure provisioning. StackGen became a HashiCorp Partner in 2025.

  

Managed Open Source Observability — Aiden delivers full-stack visibility without the cost or vendor lock-in of proprietary tooling, and without the operational overhead of managing an open source stack yourself.

  

StackGen was named a Gartner Cool Vendor for AI and IT Operations in December 2025, and recognised across four 2025 Gartner Hype Cycles: Site Reliability Engineering, Platform Engineering, Infrastructure Strategy, and I&O Automation. Trusted by Autodesk, SAP NS2, GreytHR, Nielsen, Piramal, and other enterprises across Finance and Healthcare.

  

We are growing fast, and this role is central to building the pipeline engine that matches our ambition.

  

**The Role**

  

As Demand Generation Manager, you will own the non-events pipeline for StackGen. Your mandate spans inbound discoverability, paid acquisition, outbound prospecting, ABM, triggered campaigns, and lifecycle nurture — with tight integration into our events programme. You will be the primary driver of how StackGen reaches, engages, and progresses buyers from never-heard-of-us through to commercial conversation.

  

This is an individual contributor role with broad scope. You will design, own, and optimise the demand generation system end to end, working closely with PMM, technical content, sales, marketing operations, and RevOps. You will need a strong grasp of StackGen's products, market positioning, and use cases — well enough to build campaigns credible to technical audiences and to arm the sales team with qualified pipeline.

  

This is also an AI-first role. StackGen uses AI tooling not as a productivity experiment but as a structural part of how the team operates. We expect you to build and run workflows that would be impossible for a single marketer without AI leverage — and to be the person who raises the bar for what AI-augmented demand generation looks like.

  

We are looking for someone with 3–5 years of B2B demand generation experience, ideally in DevOps, cloud native, or adjacent technical tooling markets.

  

**What You Will Own**

  

**Demand Generation Channels**

  

You will manage the full mix of non-events channels relevant to DevOps and infrastructure tooling audiences:

  

• Inbound — SEO and AEO (AI Engine Optimisation) to capture both traditional and emerging AI-assisted search behaviour, in partnership with technical content

• Paid — hands-on management of PPC (Google, Bing) and paid social (LinkedIn primary, Reddit, and emerging channels), including setup, targeting, budgets, and optimisation for pipeline quality and ROI

• Outbound — targeted sequences in co-ordination with sales and RevOps, using data enrichment and personalisation

• Events integration — extending the reach of field activity before and during events, plus post-event nurture to convert warm leads into pipeline

• ABM — targeted account-based campaigns with content and ad personalisation at the account or segment level

  

**Campaign Types**

  

You will run campaigns across three strategic models:

  

• ABM campaigns targeting key accounts with identified needs, built on technographic, firmographic, and intent signals

• Broad demand generation campaigns built around personas (platform engineer, SRE, DevOps engineer, VP Engineering, CTO) or specific use cases

• Triggered campaigns activated by behavioural, technographic, or third-party signals — reaching the right buyer at the moment of relevance

  

**Full-Funnel Lifecycle and Content**

  

Your campaigns will span the complete pre-pipeline lifecycle — from problem-aware buyers who do not yet know a solution like StackGen exists, to vendor-aware buyers actively assessing options. You will brief and create campaign content (emails, landing pages, ads, follow-up sequences), drawing on StackGen's positioning and buying reasons.

  

Nurture programmes are core: event-warm leads, inbound enquiries not yet ready for sales, and prospects re-engaged through triggered signals all need structured, staged follow-up.

  

**Performance Tracking and Optimisation**

  

You will track, report, and optimise across channels — visibility from impressions through to pipeline contribution, structured A/B tests, and data-driven budget allocation. You will work closely with marketing operations on tracking and attribution.

  

**AI-Powered Workflows**

  

You will use AI as a native part of campaign creation, execution, and optimisation. This includes ad hoc task acceleration, human-in-the-loop workflows for content quality and targeting, and autonomous or semi-autonomous workflows for research, personalisation at scale, signal processing, and reporting. Tooling includes Claude, ChatGPT, Claude Cowork, and Claude Code.

  

**What You Bring**

  

**Domain Knowledge**

  

You have genuine familiarity with the teams StackGen serves. You understand what platform engineers, SREs, DevOps engineers, and observability practitioners actually care about — well enough to write copy they will not skip and choose channels where they actually spend time. You are also comfortable speaking the language of VP Engineering and CTO buyers.

  

Experience in or adjacent to one or more of the following is strongly valued:

  

• Platform engineering and developer platforms

• DevOps tooling and CI/CD ecosystems

• Site Reliability Engineering and incident management

• Observability, monitoring, and managed open source tooling

• Developer tools (IDEs, SDKs, testing frameworks, internal developer platforms)

• Data engineering and analytics tooling

  

Experience marketing to or within the CNCF community is a strong proxy for the domain fluency we are looking for.

  

**Demand Generation Expertise**

  

You have 3–5 years of hands-on B2B demand generation experience and have built and run programmes, not just executed inside someone else's system. You understand how to construct a pipeline model, set targets by channel and stage, and use data to identify what is working. Specific experience:

  

• SEO and AEO — technical SEO execution and emerging AI-assisted search optimisation

• Paid acquisition — hands-on LinkedIn Campaign Manager and Google Ads, optimising for pipeline quality and ROI rather than just lead volume

• ABM — account selection frameworks, intent and technographic data, content personalisation

• Outbound — structuring sequences, integrating with sales, data enrichment

• Lifecycle and post-event nurture — multi-stage programmes that convert warm leads into qualified pipeline

  

**Marketing Technology**

  

• Marketing automation and CRM — HubSpot, Marketo, or equivalent; Salesforce or similar

• Paid platforms — LinkedIn Campaign Manager, Google Ads, GA4

• Intent and technographic data — Bombora, G2, 6sense, or similar

• Analytics and attribution — dashboards, attribution analysis, connecting spend to pipeline

  

AI Fluency

  

You actively use AI in your daily work — not casually but built into workflows. Comfort with Claude and ChatGPT is expected. Experience with agentic tools like Claude Code, or workflow automation platforms like n8n, is a meaningful advantage.

  

**Cross-Functional Collaboration**

  

You will work closely with PMM, marketing operations, technical content and community, sales and RevOps, product, and customer success. You are used to operating as a system player — bringing your function's output to a shared goal rather than optimising a channel in isolation.

  

**Working at StackGen**

  

The demand generation function is at an inflection point: strong product market signals, a scaling sales team, and a mandate to build the pipeline engine that matches our ambition.

  

This role has genuine scope. You will inherit channels in various states of maturity and have the latitude to redesign and build from there. The team is strong and technically credible, and the AI tooling infrastructure gives you leverage a traditional demand generation team does not have.

  

We care more about whether you genuinely know the DevOps ecosystem and can connect with the audiences we serve than which job titles you have held. A practitioner background — engineering, platform work, SRE — combined with developed demand generation skills is worth more to us than a long campaign management CV without the domain depth.

  

StackGen is an equal opportunity employer.

title: Senior Marketing Manager - India Business
